title: The Residence, 617 Malvern Road, Toorak, 3142
heading: Prestige Living in Hawksburn Village
description_plain:
The Residence at MALOURA is a magnificent Toorak masterpiece characterised by bold, sculptural forms and finely nuanced details spaced over a floor plate of over 352 approx.
In a block of just 5 residences, Bruce Henderson Architects have designed a timeless, elegant and opulent building that’s a gateway to Hawksburn, the Stonnington’s most high-end village. 
Within the residence the palatial internal proportions of 352 sqm approx. offer flexible formal and informal living areas, custom den, 3 ensuite bedrooms provide the ultimate retreat including an incredible main bedroom suite, 
 Walls of full-height glass draw in optimum sunlight throughout whilst exquisitely framing extensive outdoor spaces whilst ease of living is enhanced with direct lift access to your apartment from the basement which offers 4 car spaces.
Damastas stone is the hero material throughout, from the bathroom, with its luxury spa-like character, to the stunning kitchen which is equally adorned with Gaggenau appliances and an open-glass wine fridge. On the doorstep of Hawksburn village, there is no shortage of fine dining, retail therapy, transportation options, lavish gardens and decadent cafes.

title: Penthouse/65 Lansell Road, Toorak, 3142
heading: The Pinnacle of Design and Luxury
description_plain:
Inspect By Private Appointment

At the top of an exclusive boutique enclave and occupying a footprint of over 720sqm,  this individually curated residence captures wonderful views of the ranges and city skyline. “The Sky Residence” is a remarkable 2-level penthouse, showcasing the signature architectural and interior designer flair of Cera Stribley.

Direct lift access reveals a discreet lobby before introducing a library or executive study, wine display cupboard and magnificent open plan living and dining spaces of voluminous proportions framed by floor to ceiling glass and featuring extra wide oak floors, soaring ceilings and a gas log fire. Full height glass stacking sliders open completely to an expansive northwest facing entertaining terrace with picturesque plunge pool/spa and premium BBQ. It is a serenely private venue for al fresco dining while enjoying the panoramic views of the mountain ranges and city skyline. Deluxe appliances including Wolf ovens and cooktop, Liebherr integrated fridge/freezer and butler’s pantry with 2 Vintec bar fridges highlight the exceptional culinary capabilities of the sublime gourmet marble kitchen. A seductively curved staircase leads down to a generous fitted study area and spacious retreat or media room. Also on this level, there are three gorgeous double bedrooms with lavish en suites and walk in robes and the opulent main suite complete with sumptuous dressing room, luxurious limestone and marble en suite and the palatial bedroom with gas log fire and a private undercover terrace.

Exclusively positioned close to Heyington station, Toorak Village, trams, the Yarra River and elite schools, it includes video intercom, smart home automation, ducted heating/cooling, double glazing, powder-room, laundry, large storeroom and 7 basement car spaces.

title: 53-57 Park Street, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Rare Generational Opportunity
description_plain:
Inspect By Private Appointment

Set across three expansive levels, this extraordinary Victorian Art Nouveau terrace offers a visionary landmark in the heart of South Yarra. Painstakingly restored and brilliantly reimagined, this unique residence balances classic grandeur with contemporary elegance – its breathtaking scale, striking interiors, and refined warmth create a rarefied lifestyle for the most discerning buyer.
Recognised as South Yarra’s most ornate and irreplaceable Victorian-style façade, the commanding, grey-rendered frontage and majestic arched entry form a powerful introduction to the home’s heritage significance and architectural distinction. Nestled in the sought-after Domain precinct, the residence is positioned between the Royal Botanical Gardens and Fawkner Park, placing it in one of Melbourne’s most prestigious lifestyle settings.
Inside, sweeping dual stairways introduce soaring ceilings, marble fireplaces, and multiple formal and informal living zones. A private lift connects all levels with ease. The gourmet kitchen – appointed with a full suite of Miele appliances, oversized porcelain island, walk-in pantry and terrace servery – flows to vast open-plan living and dining, with two sets of sliding doors to a city-facing terrace, concealed TV, BBQ and outdoor kitchen.
An expansive wine room with bespoke wine storage and direct terrace access provides the ideal setting for curated entertaining.
The upper level hosts the ultimate main suite sanctuary with spectacular city skyline views, terrace access, walk-in dressing spaces with robes, and two palatial ensuites – one with a freestanding bath and vanity table. Five further spacious bedrooms – many with fireplaces, study nooks, and built-in robes – are paired with beautifully appointed ensuites.
A grand-scale, cinema-style entertaining hall with projector, a dedicated wellness studio or gym space, a second indoor kitchen, and multiple lounge and dining areas deliver exceptional family flexibility across the lower level.
An exquisite connection to the outdoors defines the home, from lush garden courtyards and elevated terraces to a magnesium pool framed by tropical greenery and a sun lounge retreat. A private lower ground courtyard offers a secluded setting for intimate entertaining.
A secure 6-7 car garage accessed via a private rear entry offers rare inner-city convenience, ideal for families and collectors alike.
Additional appointments include hydronic and reverse heating/cooling, three luxurious powder rooms, generous storage throughout, 10,000L water tank, solar panels, security system, fire alarms, auto gates, outdoor heating, outdoor pool bathroom, and ramp access to garaging.
Situated in the prestigious private school precinct and within walking distance of Melbourne’s renowned entertainment and sporting venues, this is an incomparable inner-city sanctuary of style, scale, security, and privacy - offering extraordinary liveability and showpiece entertaining in one of Melbourne’s most coveted lifestyle pockets.

title: 12 Greville Street, Prahran, 3181
heading: Victorian Elegance and a Vibrant Future
description_plain:
Expressions of Interest welcome 

Bookended by front and rear off street parking, this classic double fronted c1890’s solid brick Victorian residence’s original elegance and proportions provide the perfect foundation for aninspired renovation and extension (STCA) .Secluded behind a high walled garden, the much cherished and well-maintained home for over 60 years is comfortably presented to immediately enjoy while considering the options. The wide arched hall distinguished by lofty ceilings introduces three generous bedrooms, one with a marble fireplace and a bathroom. The dining area served by a well-equipped kitchen and a spacious livingroom opening to an undercover al fresco terrace and the paved garden with garage easily accessed via the side right of way .In a tranquil location yet only moments to Greville and Chapel Street’s renowned cafes, restaurants and shops, Prahran station, trams and elite schools, it includes hydronic heating, RC/air-conditioner, 2nd toilet, laundry and storage.

title: Penthouse, 969 High Street, Armadale, 3143
heading: Elegance Everlasting: Penthouse Residence at Amara
description_plain:
Inspect at the Display Suite by Private Appointment. 
Positioned in the heart of Armadale, Amara Penthouse is a stunning testament to architectural excellence. Designed by Bruce Henderson Architects, this residence blends modern design with timeless elegance, creating an exceptional sanctuary in one of Melbourne’s most coveted suburbs. With sweeping city views and luxurious proportions, the penthouse offers the perfect combination of privacy, comfort, and sophistication.
"The Amara Penthouse is a home that celebrates both space and serenity. With three bedrooms, a study, and expansive living areas, this residence redefines modern luxury and elevated living." — Daniel Fasciani, Architect.
As you enter this grand home, you are immediately drawn into the expansive open-plan living area, where the lounge, dining, and sitting room seamlessly connect. This creates a natural flow of light and space, ideal for both intimate gatherings and grand occasions. The chef’s kitchen, equipped with premium appliances, a long island bench, and a walk-in pantry, is designed to elevate both everyday living and entertaining. The use of natural stone and bespoke joinery throughout adds an air of refinement and sophistication.
The master suite is a true retreat, featuring two walk-in robes, a dressing area, and a private retreat with a fireplace. The luxurious ensuite, complete with a recessed bath positioned by the window, allows you to unwind in serenity while taking in the beautiful views of the city skyline.
A sculptural staircase leads you to the private rooftop terrace, where panoramic views and lush greenery create an inviting space for outdoor entertaining and quiet reflection. This exclusive rooftop garden offers the ultimate in privacy and tranquillity, perfect for both social gatherings and peaceful solitude.
Amara Penthouse features three spacious bedrooms, three meticulously designed bathrooms, and a dedicated study, providing ample space for family living and professional needs. The residence spans an impressive 287m² internally, with 61m² of external space and 75m² of rooftop, bringing the total to 423m² of luxurious living. The penthouse also includes three secure car parks, private storage, EV charging stations, and bicycle storage.
The interiors are adorned with premium finishes such as natural stone marble, an integrated wine cabinet, and a gas fireplace. The chef’s kitchen features Gaggenau appliances, a built-in oven, and a microwave, while full-height glass windows invite abundant natural light into the space. Bespoke joinery and designer lighting create an atmosphere of timeless elegance, and the seamless connection between the interior and the landscaped terraces further enhances the sense of space.
Situated just moments from Armadale’s finest dining, shopping, and transport options, this penthouse offers an unparalleled lifestyle that combines elegance, convenience, and sophistication.

title: Garden Residence, 5 Brookville Road, Toorak, 3142
heading: A New Benchmark in Toorak Luxury
description_plain:
The Brookville redefines prestige, seamlessly blending exceptional craftsmanship with timeless design to usher in a new era of upscale living. Conceived by the esteemed team at Carr Design, this architectural masterpiece embodies the elegance and refinement synonymous with Toorak.

Step inside this brand new garden residence and experience an unparalleled level of sophistication. The master suite is a private sanctuary, featuring a generous walk-in robe and a beautifully appointed ensuite with a rainfall shower, freestanding bath, and indulgent underfloor heating. Two additional bedrooms, each with built-in robes, are serviced by a stylish central bathroom and a separate powder room for guests.
At the heart of the residence, the expansive kitchen is a statement of modern luxury. Full-height marbled stone splashbacks, striking timber waterfall-edge island benches, and premium V-ZUG appliances—including a five-burner gas cooktop, warming drawer, and integrated dishwasher—create a space that is both beautiful and functional. A Sub-Zero integrated fridge/freezer further elevates this culinary haven.
Designed for effortless entertaining, the light-filled living and dining area extends to a spacious north-facing courtyard, offering the perfect setting for intimate gatherings or grand celebrations.
Additional features such as secure basement parking for two cars, private lift access, and exclusive entry points ensure every aspect of convenience is met.
Inspired by Australian Modernism, The Brookville embraces Toorak’s rich heritage while introducing a refined new lifestyle. Ideally positioned within walking distance of Toorak and Hawksburn Villages, Brookville Gardens, and seamless transport links, this residence offers the best of Melbourne’s most coveted suburb.
Discover The Brookville—a rare fusion of visionary design, prestige, and enduring elegance.

title: 1 Nola Court, Toorak, 3142
heading: Exclusive Toorak Cul-De-Sac Gem
description_plain:
Inspect By Private Appointment 
Selling in Conjunction with Bekdon Richards - Paul Richards - 0414 503 324.

North Facing and exclusively situated at the end of a tranquil cul de sac, this extremely well-maintained family home offers a prime development opportunity in one of Toorak's most prized pockets between Clendon and Irving Roads. With 687m2 (approx.) of land and a broad street frontage, this is a prospect not to be missed.

A grand and stylish front entrance opens to a spacious foyer, continuing onto a cosy carpeted lounge with ornamental fireplace. The rear of the home boasts a brightly lit open plan living, kitchen and dining area with stunning bay window overlooking lush established gardens. Kitchen features gas cooking, oven, dishwasher, and ample storage

The Master bedroom offers charm and elegance with private balcony access and built in cabinetry, alongside a large walk-in robe and ensuite. 3 further spacious bedrooms are each equipped with built-in robes. Two sunbathed decks present the perfect opportunity for outdoor relaxation and entertaining.
Superbly positioned in one of Toorak's premier tree-lined streets, surrounded by prestigious family homes, walking distance to Beatty Ave restaurants and cafes, Hawksburn and Toorak Villages, Malvern Road trams, Toorak Station, Orrong Park, and some of Melbourne's finest schools including Loreto, Lauriston and St Catherine's.

title: Penthouse, 661 Chapel Street, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Complete your Dream
description_plain:
Inspect By Private Appointment 

Create your own unparalleled luxury with this stunning penthouse shell in one of Melbourne’s most prestigious locations. 
Spanning over of 700 sqm (approx.) crowned by your own a rooftop garden, featuring breathtaking 280-degree views of the Melbourne skyline, Port Phillip Bay and out towards the Dandenong’s, providing one of the most stunning backdrops.
The proposed floorplan and interior concepts created by Seidler Group, offers modern design that is complemented by floor-to-ceiling windows that flood the expansive living areas with natural light. 
The proposed scheme features three spacious bedrooms, expansive formal and informal living areas, gourmet kitchen with a large butler’s pantry and custom wine cellar. 
The master suite is a private sanctuary with hotel inspired ensuite & incredible walk-in wardrobe. 
It also offers nine secure car parks 
Building amenities include a grand lobby with concierge, library, lounge with a fireplace, and entertainment spaces, wellness zone including a spa pool, sauna, theatre, sports lounge, and a 25m cantilevered lap pool. 
With concierge service, residents enjoy easy access to Woolworths, cinemas, and transport options, with the Yarra River and Royal Botanic Gardens nearby. Melbourne High School, RMIT, and the University of Melbourne are within reach.
This penthouse is a semi-warm shell, offering you the opportunity to complete the final stage of the fit-out to your personal preferences in this already established building.

title: 62 Clendon Road, Toorak, 3142
heading: “Cranlana” – An Estate of Historic Significance with an Exciting Future
description_plain:
Magnificently situated within Toorak’s largest landholding of 1.1 hectares (11,366sqm approx.), this celebrated c1900 Edwardian estate is a Victorian landmark of historic, cultural and botanic significance and offering an approved Heritage Victoria permit for a significant renovation and extension*. The exceptional scale, elegance and grandeur of the distinguished home is matched by breathtaking parkland surrounds encompassing a Harold Desbrowe Annear designed sunken garden, numerous significant trees, a pool and north-south tennis court.

Beyond the high stone wall and Italianate wrought iron gates, a long circular drive arrives at the welcoming marble foyer flowing through to a spectacular reception room displaying a soaring ornate ceiling, roaring fireplace and timber floors. Emanating from the central hall, a gracious morning room, elegant drawing room, evocative library and grand formal dining room all feature fireplaces and glorious garden outlooks. Inviting entertaining on a lavish scale, the imposing music or ballroom with fireplace, parquetry floors, timber paneling and bay window opens through 4 sets of French doors to the garden. A series of sculleries, preparation rooms and kitchens equipped with multiple ovens including an original wood stove cater to any entertaining requirement.

An abundance of flexible accommodation comprises a captivating downstairs guest bedroom with en suite and dressing room, the main bedroom with en suite and robes, two additional bedrooms with en suites, two double bedrooms with robes, a retreat, bathroom and powder-room. In addition, there is a self-contained 1-bedroom apartment upstairs and a 1-bedroom housekeeper’s apartment and office on the ground level.

The crowning glory of this unique property is the extraordinary garden, widely believed to be the finest in the state. Completely private, utterly tranquil and filled with rare and century-old trees and plants, it is a botanic marvel. Vast formal lawns separated by low stone walls designed in 1934 by Harold Desbrowe Annear culminate in the renowned sunken garden with a gorgeous pond and fountain at its centre. Behind a 100-year-old Wisteria “hedge” there is the north-south mod grass tennis court and picturesque pool with pool house.  Numerous outbuildings including a self-contained cottage, former stables, potting shed, workshop, gardener’s headquarters and triple garage are at the rear of the main residence and accessed via a second driveway.

For the first time in over one hundred years, this is an unprecedented opportunity to take over the custody of one of Melbourne’s most significant estates. Land size: 11,366sqm (approx.). 
Transaction Advisor – Charter Keck Cramer – Scott Keck, Tom Byrnes and Patrick McNulty

*Plans available upon application.

title: 48 Claremont Street, South Yarra, 3141
heading: The Penthouse
description_plain:
Centrally located with a stellar international walk score of 92, this Walker’s Paradise ensures daily errands are easily accomplished without a car.

Designed by Plus Architects, the interiors boast the finest materials, including imported marble, for an exquisite living experience.

title: 19 Avoca Street, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Avoca House
description_plain:
Inspect by Private Appointment 
Set proudly on Avoca St in Domain Hill, one of South Yarra’s most coveted and lifestyle centric address’ “Avoca House” is a professional collaboration between the renowned Pandolfini Architects & Myles Baldwin Landscaping,  that is luxuriously delivered by Prime Edition. 
Immerse yourself in expansive living spaces that extend over 680 sqm (approx.) internally , meticulously designed landscapes, and exquisite materials that create a haven of effortless elegance and thoughtful design. 
Step inside this expansive 4 bedroom, 4 bathroom home and be greeted by a stunning and exceptionally functional layout bathed in an abundance of natural light.
Indulge in a sophisticated yet warm ambiance, featuring light timber floors, rich stone joinery, and decadent textures bathed in natural light. A large gas fireplace further accentuates the expansive living areas, while brass, natural stone, and extensive timber create a welcoming atmosphere.
The gourmet kitchen boasts premium Wolf & Sub-Zero appliances, natural stone benchtops, and luxurious, zip tap, concealed wine fridge, and Broadware tapware. The Bathrooms echo this luxury with beautiful natural stone, underfloor heating, heated towel rails & double vanities. 
The palatial main bedroom suite features a walk-in wardrobe/dressing room and a luxurious ensuite with double showers. 
Extending to the 3rd floor, relax on your private rooftop entertaining level with bar and wellness zone including sauna and ice bath that all open to an expansive terrace offering city views and spa. 
The basement provides garaging for 4 cars, gymnasium room and first lift access to all levels. 

Avoca Street is one of only a handful of streets in the prestigious enclave of South Yarra known as Domain Hill. This positions you at the pinnacle of Melbourne's most vibrant neighborhood, moments from notable schools, renowned cafes and restaurants.

title: 17 Avoca Street, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Elevate Your Lifestyle: Luxury Living at Avoca - Residence 3
description_plain:
Inspect the Display Suite by Private Appointment
Discover your own sanctuary at ‘Avoca’, a palatial 314 sqm full-floor residence gracefully situated above the verdant landscape of Domain Hill. This exquisite, single-level home showcases the vision of Pandolfini Architecture, Myles Baldwin Landscaping, and Prime Edition Developments. With only five exclusive residences, ‘Avoca’ offers a boutique lifestyle that harmonises seamlessly with its surroundings, embodying the serene and timeless elegance of Domain Hill through balanced forms, a sophisticated palette, and sculptural design elements.
Immerse yourself in expansive outdoor spaces, meticulously landscaped grounds, and exquisite materials that create a haven of effortless sophistication and intentional design. Step into the spacious 3/4-bedroom, 3-bathroom residence, where an open-plan layout is flooded with natural light. Expansive sliding doors open onto a generous entertainer’s terrace, ideal for alfresco dining against a lush backdrop.
Savour a warm, inviting ambience, highlighted by light timber floors, rich stone joinery, and luxurious textures bathed in sunlight. A large gas fireplace adds warmth to the spacious living areas, while brass, natural stone, and extensive timber elements enhance the sense of comfort and style.
The gourmet kitchen features premium Wolf and Sub-Zero appliances, natural stone benchtops, and luxurious touches such as a grooved limestone island, zip tap, concealed wine fridge, and Brodware tapware. Bathrooms reflect the same level of refinement, with underfloor heating, heated towel rails, double vanities, and stunning Scarpa stone mosaic wall tiles in the powder room.
Designed with art lovers in mind, Avoca provides ample wall space, specialised lighting, and art rails throughout to showcase your collection beautifully.
The expansive main suite offers a spacious walk-in wardrobe and a luxurious ensuite with double vanities for ultimate comfort.
Built with timeless materials such as limestone, travertine, and gentle curves, Avoca is designed to mature gracefully. Deep windows and cascading planter boxes allow for seamless indoor–outdoor flow, with captivating views from every angle.
Residents enjoy convenient, secure access through a brass gateway to basement parking or via a pedestrian entrance to the lift lobby. Lift access delivers you directly to your private full-floor residence, ensuring both privacy and ease of living.
Set on Avoca Street, one of the select few streets in South Yarra’s coveted Domain Hill enclave, you’re positioned at the heart of Melbourne’s most vibrant neighbourhood. With acclaimed schools, renowned cafés and restaurants, the Toorak Road strip, and Stonnington’s finest parklands moments away, this location is unmatched. For travel beyond, South Yarra Station, bus and tram routes, and major freeways ensure effortless connectivity.
Contact us today to experience Avoca and discover your own private full-floor sanctuary.

title: Garden Residence, 17 Avoca Street, South Yarra, 3141
display_address: Garden Residence, 17 Avoca Street, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Avoca - The Lifestyle Residence
description_plain:
Inspect at the Display Suite by Private Appointment. 
Nestled amidst the verdant embrace of Domain Hill, South Yarra's most sought-after pocket, Avoca offers a vision of contemporary living intertwined with nature's beauty. This exquisite single-level residence is the product of a renowned collaboration between Paldolfini Architecture, Myles Baldwin Landscaping, and Prime Edition Developments. With only five residences, Avoca offers an exclusive boutique development that seamlessly blends with its environment, echoing the calm and timeless qualities of Domain Hill with well-composed forms, a restrained palette, and sculptural elements.

Step inside the expansive 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom haven and be greeted by an open floorplan bathed in light. Floor-to-ceiling windows seamlessly connect you to three private courtyards, each designed by the renowned Myles Baldwin. Immerse yourself in the tranquillity of a secluded reading nook in one, enjoy al fresco dining under the stars in another, and let the third become a vibrant sanctuary for entertaining guests.

Light timber floors and rich stone joinery with subtle veins set the stage for a sophisticated yet warm ambiance. Decadent textures dance in the natural light that streams through the home, creating a truly immersive experience. A large gas fireplace further accentuates the expansive living areas, while brass, natural stone, and extensive timber create a warming and welcoming ambience throughout.

The gourmet kitchen boasts premium Wolf & Sub-Zero appliances, natural stone benchtops, and luxurious touches like a grooved limestone island, zip tap, concealed wine fridge, and Broadware tapware. Bathrooms echo this luxury with underfloor heating, heated towel rails, double vanities, and stunning Scarpa stone pattern mosaic wall tiles in the powder room.

Understanding that residents will bring personal art collections, Avoca features generous allowances of wall space, specialized lighting, and art rails throughout.

Crafted with enduring materials like limestone, travertine, and gentle curves, Avoca is built to age gracefully. Punctuated by deep windows and a ribbon of planter boxes, it seamlessly blends indoor and outdoor living.

Convenient and secure access awaits residents through a brass gateway to the basement carparking or a pedestrian entrance to the lift lobby. A private elevator whisks you directly to your haven.

Avoca Street is one of only a handful of streets in the prestigious enclave of South Yarra known as Domain Hill. This places you near notable schools, renowned cafes and restaurants, the Toorak Road strip, and the best parkland Stonnington has to offer. When venturing beyond, South Yarra station, multiple bus and tram routes, and major freeways offer effortless connectivity.

title: 4/12 Springfield Avenue, Toorak, 3142
heading: Brand New Village Luxe Apartment
description_plain:
Luxury boutique living has never been as beautifully executed as in this stunning brand-new residence, one of just five, within the exclusive Mills Gorman Architects designed "Village Luxe". The refined design, bespoke finishes and expansive proportions deliver an incomparable lock up and leave lifestyle on the edge of Toorak and Hawksburn Villages.

An array of premium features including rich dark oak parquetry floors, inlaid carpets, natural stone, high ceilings, hand-crafted mosaic tiles and solid timber joinery exemplify the elite quality throughout. The broad gallery flows through to a fitted home office, versatile retreat or executive study and the spectacular open plan living and dining room with gas fire and a striking conservatory style glass ceiling. 
Premium appliances including Gaggenau ovens, cooktops and integrated fridge/freezers, natural stone benches and a butler's pantry establish the impeccable culinary credentials of the sublime gourmet kitchen. Full width glass sliders open living and al fresco entertaining options to a generous balcony offering views over the rooftops. The sumptuous main bedroom with deluxe fitted dressing room and lavish en suite with a mosaic tiled floor is accompanied by two additional double bedrooms with robes and stylish en suites.

Idyllically situated a short walk to Toorak station, trams, excellent schools and Orrong Park, it includes lift access, video intercom, zoned RC/air-conditioning, powder-room, laundry and 2 basement car spaces.

title: North Penthouse, 63 Heyington Place, Toorak, 3142
heading: Final Release - Award Winning Penthouse
description_plain:
Nestled within the prestigious Toorak locale, this Developer held final Penthouse, envisioned by Carr Design and distinguished with the Interior Design Excellence Award, enjoys an exclusive position and has finally been released to the market. Last of it's kind in this tightly held and much sought after development. Surrounded by meticulously landscaped gardens by Acre Landscape Architecture, this residence boasts awe-inspiring, house-sized proportions. Recognized for its exceptional quality, the interiors,  recently honored with the IDEA award in the multi-level residential category, showcase Portuguese limestone, high ceilings, oak parquetry floors, bespoke timber joinery, and oversized pivot doors, creating an ambiance of refined luxury for both casual living and grand entertaining.

Upon entering the expansive foyer, discover a spacious sitting or media room, leading to the extraordinary open plan living and dining area featuring a gas fireplace. Bathed in northern light, the living spaces seamlessly extend to a breathtaking northeast wrap-around garden and a sizable private terrace with unobstructed views.

The gourmet kitchen stands as a pinnacle of modern design, featuring sleek limestone benches, Gaggenau appliances, integrated Liebherr fridge/freezer, and a complete butler's pantry.

In a dedicated wing, the main bedroom, complemented by a customized dressing room and lavish en suite, opens to the garden. Two additional bedrooms with built-in robes and stylish en suites also provide direct access to the garden. 

Only moments away from Heyington station, Yarra River parkland, Toorak Village, and esteemed schools, this residence is equipped with video intercom, zoned heating/cooling, double glazing, powder-room, laundry, a separate large storage room, and three basement garage spaces.

title: The Residence, 1167 High Street, Armadale, 3143
heading: Timeless Residence above the Epicentre of Armadale
description_plain:
Imagine unwinding on your expansive terrace, watching the sun set over High Street—a breathtaking backdrop for year-round entertaining. This under-construction residence offers a rare opportunity to secure a sophisticated home with significant stamp duty savings available. Buy now and move in next year.

Designed for both comfort and luxury, this meticulously crafted apartment features full-height doors, double-glazed glass for acoustic and environmental performance, and a smart lock entry system. The kitchen is a chef’s dream, boasting a Liebherr refrigerator, Gaggenau induction cooktop and oven, and a custom bar with a Whispair cylindrical rangehood.

Experience effortless living with a Phillips Dynalite automated lighting system, heated towel rails and underfloor heating in the master ensuite, and concealed ducted reverse-cycle heating and cooling. Secure basement parking for two cars with number plate recognition ensures convenience and peace of mind.

Don’t miss this chance to secure an exceptional home in one of Melbourne’s most sought-after locations.

Additionally, only a short drive to Malvern Central, Chadstone Shopping Centre, Monash Freeway on ramp for access to the city and beyond and some of Melbourne’s best schools.

Take advantage of the existing permit to create a superb family home of grand proportions. The permit is for an 811sqm (approx.) 5-bedroom, 3-level family home featuring a wine cellar, home theatre room, gym and six car basement.

title: The Residence, 959 High Street, Armadale, 3143
heading: The Residence at Alara" - Refined Boutique Luxury
description_plain:
Heralding the pinnacle of boutique living in Armadale, this spectacular 304sqm (approx.) residence occupies the entire northern wing of the 3rd level in the acclaimed "Alara" building designed by Bruce Henderson in conjunction with Carr Interiors. From the sophisticated foyer with its vast planes of Travertine to the elite position amongst Armadale's finest boutiques, restaurants and cafes, this is the ultimate in lock up and leave luxury.
A palette of smokey oak timber floors and natural stone provides a wonderful warmth to the interior spaces enhanced by bespoke joinery and full width sheers. Bathed in northern light, the expansive open plan living and dining room opens to a fabulous covered terrace, the ideal setting for al fresco dining while enjoying the picturesque city views. Sleek and streamlined, the premium kitchen is appointed with stone benches and Miele appliances including integrated fridge/freezer. A generous sitting or media room opens to the north-facing balcony which stretches the full width of the residence. A spacious home office is also conveniently accessed from a second entrance when required. The lavish main bedroom with deluxe built in robes and a designer en suite and two additional bedrooms with robes and stylish en suites all open to the northern balcony commanding city views.
Comprehensively finished, this beautiful residence includes a sensational wine display/tasting room, lift access, video intercom, zoned heating/cooling, powder-room, laundry, extensive storage and basement parking for 3 cars.

title: 106/250 Wattletree Road, Malvern, 3144
heading: Thoughtful Design, Elegant Finishes
description_plain:
Recently completed + now ready to occupy today, Apartment 106 is part of a boutique collection of residences by Ascui & Co. Architects. Artfully-designed and immaculately-appointed, this sculpted home is the embodiment of their exquisite address. Here, all of Malvern’s natural and cultural delights are within arms reach, gifting residents with a rich yet ever-tranquil existence.

Defined by floor-to-ceiling windows, the open-plan living room is awash with abundant natural light and verdant vistas of the landscaping and surrounding treetops. Housed within stone joinery, an opulent fireplace creates a cosy atmosphere while efficiently heating the space. The main bedroom is complimented by a stylish ensuite, with the secondary bedrooms sharing a central bathroom boasting an expansive shower and free-standing bathtub, enjoy moments of pure self-care whenever you please..

Engineered timber floors in a timeless Herringbone style provide the perfect base for living – a material as sturdy as it is beautiful and texturally rich. Full-height joinery with a wood grain texture has been paired with elegant fluted glass cabinetry, which together, provide a home for all your culinary tools and pantry items. Bringing a sleek and modern feel to the palette, a suite of premium Gaggenau appliances ensures all meals are perfectly cooked.

heading: A Home of Enduring Elegance in One of South Yarra’s Most Prestigious Streets
description_plain:
Experience sophisticated living in the heart of South Yarra with Rockley, a collection of exquisitely designed residences combining space, elegance, and world-class finishes. Ideal for owner-occupiers, empty nesters, and buyers seeking premium quality, privacy, and timeless design.

Key Property Features

- Exclusive 52-week builder warranty and 10-year structural guarantee 
- Private internal lift for effortless multi-level living
- Designer kitchen with Pitt Natural gas cooktop, premium Miele and Gaggenau appliances
- Palladiana terrazzo, travertine and natural stone finishes throughout
- Bespoke joinery including custom TV and gas fireplace cabinetry

________________________________________


Prime Location Benefits

Nestled on South Yarra’s prestigious Rockley Road, residents enjoy unparalleled convenience and lifestyle amenities:

- Walk Score: Exceptional – everything at your doorstep
- Public Transport:
- Tram: 72 Tram at Chapel Street (~5-min walk)
- Train: South Yarra Station (~10-min walk)
- Nearby Cafes & Dining: The Little Mule, Top Paddock, Auction Rooms
- Shopping & Entertainment: Close to Chapel Street boutiques, supermarkets, and South Yarra’s vibrant nightlife

________________________________________


About the Developer & Design Team

- Builder: Pulitano Group – renowned for premium residential projects with exceptional quality and design that endures including extended guarantees and warranties.
- Architect & Interior Design: Genton – multi-award-winning practice, celebrated for crafting spaces that combine elegance, light, and function. 
- Landscape Design: John Patrick Landscape Architects – creating lush, sophisticated gardens that complement the architectural vision.

________________________________________


Why Choose These Residences?

Rockley embodies a harmonious blend of luxury, space, and lifestyle convenience:

- Generous Interiors: Expansive rooms, high ceilings, and natural light throughout
- Palatial Living Areas: Open-plan kitchen and living areas featuring statement marble island benches, sculptural fireplaces, and full-height timber joinery
- Bedrooms & Retreats: Master bedroom with curved walls, plush carpets, and a spa-like ensuite with dual stone vanities
- Attention to Detail: Bespoke finishes, carefully curated textures, and elegant joinery for enduring style
- Sustainability: Energy-efficient design with double-glazed windows and advanced appliances

________________________________________


Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

Q: When can I move in?
A: Residences are ready for occupancy by August 2026.

Q: What makes Rockley different from other South Yarra homes?
A: Rockley combines generous space, premium materials, private lifts, and a double lock-up garage with award-winning architecture and landscaping.

Q: Are there warranties?
A: Yes – 10-year building guarantee and 52-week defect guarantee.

Q: How close is public transport?
A: Tram and train options are within a 5–10 minute walk, making commuting effortless.

Q: What about nearby lifestyle amenities?
A: Rockley is steps from South Yarra’s top cafes, restaurants, boutique shopping, and green spaces.

________________________________________


Rockley Road residences represent an opportunity to secure a spacious, contemporary home in one of Melbourne’s most coveted neighborhoods. Combining timeless design, meticulous craftsmanship, and everyday convenience, these homes are built to elevate your lifestyle.

Contact us today to arrange a private viewing or to learn more about these exceptional South Yarra residences.

title: 71 Mathoura
heading: Five House Sized Residences by Studio McCue – Move in Spring 2026
description_plain:
Boutique 3 & 4 Bedroom Residences with Northern Terraces & House-Like Scale

Discover 71 Mathoura Road, Toorak - a rare opportunity to secure one of just five architecturally designed residences by Studio McCue, in a tightly held blue-chip location. This project is currently under construction with Espire and due to be complete in Spring (this year).

Each home offers expansive open-plan living flowing to generous northern terraces, full-height glazing, and sculptural stone kitchens anchored by a circa 4m island bench. Integrated Miele and Liebherr appliances, Astra Walker tapware and refined joinery elevate daily living.

Primary suites feature dedicated dressing rooms and light-filled ensuites, while deep overhangs and operable louvres ensure year-round comfort and privacy.

A boutique address defined by light, landscape and permanence.

⸻

Location Benefits

• Prestigious Toorak address within a quiet, tree-lined streetscape
• Moments to Toorak Village cafés, boutiques and daily conveniences
• Easy access to leading private schools
• Close proximity to Hawksburn Village and High Street Armadale
• Established residential setting surrounded by quality homes
• Elevated aspects with leafy outlooks and city glimpses in select residences
• Ideal for downsizers seeking permanence, privacy and low-maintenance luxury

⸻

Why Choose 71 Mathoura?

71 Mathoura presents a rare opportunity to secure one of just five architecturally considered residences in one of Melbourne’s most tightly held suburbs.

Designed with sculptural form and defined by light, privacy and permanence, these homes offer house-like scale without the upkeep. Expansive terraces, layered landscaping and full-height glazing create seamless indoor-outdoor living, while generous proportions and premium materials elevate everyday life.

The circa 4m natural stone island anchors open-plan living, complemented by integrated European appliances and bespoke joinery. Primary suites feel like private retreats, complete with dedicated dressing rooms and beautifully appointed ensuites bathed in natural light.

This is boutique living for buyers who value architecture, proportion and long-term quality - a rare offering in blue-chip Toorak.

⸻

About the Design & Delivery Team

About the Team

Developer – EDK
EDK is a privately led development group focused on delivering boutique, design-led residential projects in Melbourne’s most established suburbs. With an emphasis on quality over quantity, EDK curates projects defined by architectural integrity, considered scale and long-term liveability.

Architect – Chris McCue, Studio McCue
Led by Chris McCue, Studio McCue is recognised for refined contemporary architecture that balances sculptural form with restraint. At 71 Mathoura, the practice’s emphasis on proportion, northern light and material permanence is expressed through deep overhangs, inset balconies and layered façades that sit comfortably within Toorak’s prestigious streetscape.

Builder – Espire
Espire is a highly regarded Melbourne builder specialising in premium residential construction. Known for precision detailing and disciplined delivery, Espire ensures the architectural intent of 71 Mathoura is executed with craftsmanship and care.

Financier – Pallas Capital
Pallas Capital is a leading Australian real estate investment manager providing structured funding solutions to high-quality residential developments. Their involvement reinforces the project’s financial strength and delivery certainty.

⸻

FAQs

Q: How many residences are in the building?
A: Only five boutique residences, ensuring privacy and exclusivity.

Q: Are the apartments north-facing?
A: Each apartment is north facing, and offers a triple aspect. Living zones and terraces are designed to capture northern light, with deep overhangs and louvres for year-round comfort.

Q: What appliances and finishes are included?
A: Integrated Miele and Liebherr appliances, Astra Walker tapware, sculptural natural stone island benches and bespoke joinery throughout.

Q: Who are these residences suited to?
A: Ideal for downsizers and owner-occupiers seeking house-like proportions in a low-maintenance, architecturally significant setting.

________________________________________

Location Benefits

Enjoy the best of Armadale and Malvern, steps from your door:

•	Malvern Train Station, just ~750 m away, gives direct access to Melbourne CBD

•	High Street Armadale nearby for boutique shopping, fashion, and cafés
•	Green spaces like Bailey Avenue Park just minutes away
•	Easy access to nearby tram lines and major roads for convenient commuting

Popular cafés close by include:
•	Coin Laundry Café – scenic courtyard dining
•	Moby 3143 – light-filled rooftop café

________________________________________

Why Choose Society Armadale?

Society Armadale is a rare opportunity to own 3- or 4-bedroom oversized luxury apartments in a precinct where such scale, quality, and amenity seldom appear. Backed by Krongold’s craftsmanship and a 52-week defect guarantee, these homes combine premium appliances, smart technology, and concierge-level service for a truly refined living experience. Whether you’re downsizing, raising a family, or seeking a high-end lifestyle home, these residences deliver timeless luxury and uncompromised quality.

________________________________________

A: Society Armadale offers 3  and 4 bedroom luxury apartments, many with two living areas or a study.

Q: Are the homes energy-efficient?

Q: What security & convenience features are included?
A: On-site concierge, number plate recognition to access the basement, smart locks, 24/7 surveillance, private garages, EV charging, and parcel lockers.

heading: Elevated One Bedroom Retreat with City Views and Designer Finishes
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Occupying a premier position in Prahran's most prestigious tree-lined boulevard, this beautifully renovated one bedroom, top floor apartment offers a refined, light-filled sanctuary with sweeping views of the Melbourne skyline.

Recently renovated throughout with contemporary interiors, creating an elegant & warm ambiance with brand-new carpets and light fittings. The heart of the home is a stunning new kitchen featuring stone bench tops, induction cooktop, streamlined finishes, and clever storage. 

Bathed in natural light, the open-plan living and dining domain flows seamlessly to a private balcony the perfect elevated vantage point to relax and watch the city lights, complemented by soft sheer curtains and a split system for year round heating and cooling.

The spacious bedroom is well serviced by a stylishly renovated bathroom with provision for washing machine, electric wall heater and finished with clean lines and stylish fittings.

Additional features include undercover off street parking for one vehicle and access to communal laundry facilities.

Ideally located moments from Hawksurn Village, High Street and Chapel Street, with easy access to cafes, transport and parklands, this is a home that balances lifestyle and convenience with a polished, modern edge. A must inspect!

**To Inspect**

To book an inspection, click either the ‘Request Online Inspection Link’ or ‘Get in Touch’ then select ‘Request an Inspection’ to enter your details. An inspection invitation will then be sent to you via our application platform. If there are no available inspection times, or you cannot attend the listed time, please send an enquiry or contact the leasing agent for further assistance. Please note ‘add to plan’ is not booking into the inspection.

**Please Note** 

Open for Inspection times and property availability is subject to change without notice. We highly recommend registering for an inspection you are going to attend to avoid disappointment for cancellations. If you are registered for an inspection, you will be notified by SMS if the inspection is cancelled. 

 **Caution** 
 
Marshall White has exclusive leasing rights to this property. We do not advertise on Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace or any other social media platforms. Please beware of scammers and apply only via the official advertising link using the Snug platform.

heading: Elevated Living in a Prestigious Malvern Setting
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Positioned high above the leafy streets of Malvern with a prized north-west aspect, this stunning three-bedroom, two-bathroom sub-penthouse offers an exceptional rental opportunity defined by space, light, and refined modern design.

Bathed in natural light and capturing sweeping views, the expansive open-plan living and dining zone flows seamlessly onto a private terrace—perfect for entertaining or unwinding in complete privacy. The gourmet kitchen is beautifully appointed with premium appliances, stone finishes, and an integrated wine fridge, delivering both style and functionality for everyday living.

Each bedroom is thoughtfully designed to provide comfort and separation, while the luxurious main suite offers a hotel-style retreat with a sophisticated ensuite and custom joinery.

Set within a boutique, architecturally designed building inspired by Malvern’s leafy surrounds, this residence combines timeless design with contemporary convenience in one of the area’s most sought-after locations.

Features include:
 • Light-filled open-plan living with private terrace
 • Premium kitchen with high-end appliances & integrated wine fridge
 • Three spacious bedrooms, each with excellent storage
 • Luxurious main suite with ensuite and custom joinery
 • Double glazed windows for comfort and quiet living
 • Keyless entry and secure parcel lockers
 • Fireplace and custom-built TV cabinetry
 • Two secure basement car spaces

Enjoy a lifestyle of convenience with shops, cafes, and transport just moments away, all while residing in a peaceful, elevated sanctuary.

heading: Refined Edwardian Living with Designer Renovation and Sunny Courtyard
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions

A beautiful blend of period charm and contemporary refinement, this classic Edwardian residence has been thoughtfully updated to deliver a light filled and highly functional inner-city lifestyle.
Recently refreshed throughout, the home features new paint, new blinds and a stunning renovated bathroom and laundry, all complementing the home’s original character. High ceilings, polished timber floors and decorative fireplaces enhance two generous bedrooms, each offering excellent proportions and natural light.
The heart of the home opens to an expansive living and dining domain, seamlessly connected to a sleek, updated kitchen with stone benchtops and quality appliances. Bathed in natural light, this space flows effortlessly through to a private, sun filled courtyard, creating an ideal setting for entertaining or quiet enjoyment.
The newly renovated bathroom is beautifully appointed with a clean, modern aesthetic, while the separate laundry adds further practicality.
Additional features include ducted heating and cooling, large roof attic storage and a highly sought after South Yarra location.
Positioned moments from Fawkner Park, Toorak Road, Prahran Market and Chapel Street, with easy access to South Yarra Station and trams, this is a home that delivers lifestyle, character and convenience in equal measure.

**To Inspect**

To book an inspection, click either the ‘Request Online Inspection Link’ or ‘Get in Touch’ then select ‘Request an Inspection’ to enter your details. An inspection invitation will then be sent to you via our application platform. If there are no available inspection times, or you cannot attend the listed time, please send an enquiry or contact the leasing agent for further assistance. Please note ‘add to plan’ is not booking into the inspection.

**Please Note** 

Open for Inspection times and property availability is subject to change without notice. We highly recommend registering for an inspection you are going to attend to avoid disappointment for cancellations. If you are registered for an inspection, you will be notified by SMS if the inspection is cancelled. 
 
 **Caution** 
 
Marshall White has exclusive leasing rights to this property. We do not advertise on Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace or any other social media platforms. Please beware of scammers and apply only via the official advertising link using the Snug platform.

title: 30 Victoria Road North, Malvern, 3144
heading: Architecturally Designed Style and Elegance
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.
 
 The instant appeal of this captivating double-fronted, newly renovated and extended Federation residence is enhanced by a flawless design conceived by award-winning Page Stewart Architects. The result is a seamless fusion of contemporary architectural style and peerless family functionality. 

A refined palette of muted tones, natural stone, limed oak floors and bespoke joinery creates an atmosphere of calm sophistication throughout. Beautifully landscaped gardens by Alto Landscapes provide a captivating backdrop and private sanctuary. 

A broad central hallway introduces an elegant sitting room with fireplace, separate home office also with fireplace, and a generous retreat/media room. Flooded with natural light, the spectacular open-plan living and dining domain features a gas log fire and relaxed daybed overlooking the central courtyard, where garden vistas are created throughout the main living space. The kitchen is a true showpiece, appointed with stone benchtops, a walk-in pantry, appliance cupboard, integrated fridge/freezer and dual ovens, catering equally to family living and entertaining. Oversized glass sliders extend the living space to a private northeast-facing garden with a mosaic-tiled heated pool framed by lush greenery. 

Family accommodation is intelligently zoned. On the ground level, the sublime main suite boasts original leadlight windows, fireplace, walk-in robe and luxe ensuite, complemented by a stylish second bathroom. A sweeping curved staircase ascends to a dedicated children’s zone with three double bedrooms (all with robes), a fitted study and a lavish third bathroom. 

Perfectly positioned at the end of a coveted cul-de-sac just moments from Glenferrie Road’s boutiques and restaurants, Malvern Central, Malvern Station, elite schools and Penpraze Park. 

Additional features include zoned heating/cooling, double glazing, security cameras, cellar, family-sized laundry/scullery with, large outdoor storage room, three phase power and secure off-street parking. 
 

**To Inspect**
 
To book an inspection, click either the ‘Request Online Inspection Link’ or ‘Get in Touch’ then select ‘Request an Inspection’ to enter your details. An inspection invitation will then be sent to you via our application platform. If there are no available inspection times, or you cannot attend the listed time, please send an enquiry or contact the leasing agent for further assistance. Please note ‘add to plan’ is not booking into the inspection.

heading: Spacious & Convenient Living in Prime Malvern East Location
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions

Perfectly positioned in the heart of Malvern East, this home offers comfort, space, and unbeatable convenience.
Boasting a flexible floorplan, the property features generous living and dining areas filled with natural light, complemented by a well-appointed kitchen with ample storage and functionality. The bedrooms are well-sized, providing comfortable accommodation for families or professionals alike, while the central bathroom is neat and practical.

Outside, enjoy a low-maintenance yard ideal for relaxed living.

Comprising a generous ground floor double bedroom with built in robes and French doors opening to the garden, whilst two gorgeous double bedrooms (Split system installed in main upstairs bedroom) with built in robes and a stylish bathroom (with shower over bath) are upstairs. The property features Baltic pine floors, open plan modernised kitchen with plenty of storage, gas cooking, full sized dishwasher, open living and dining area with split system, and doors that open to a private courtyard. Advantaged by 2 street frontages with entry from Bidey Street and Closeburn Ave, the property also includes a separate laundry and 2nd ground floor toilet, storage under the staircase and attic (for additional storage with easy stair access) and an outside Shed. heading: Courtyard Living in a Premier Chapel Street Pocket
description_plain:

Perfectly positioned for an enviable inner-city lifestyle, this exquisite residence invites you to move straight in and enjoy the very best of its vibrant surroundings. Just moments from the renowned shopping and dining precincts of Chapel Street, Greville Street and Toorak Road, the home is immersed in a dynamic café and restaurant culture while still offering a peaceful retreat.

Upon entry, a spacious and light-filled living area creates an inviting first impression, flowing through to a well-appointed gourmet kitchen featuring ample storage, a Bosch dishwasher and gas cooktop. The adjoining dining domain opens seamlessly to a sunny courtyard, providing the perfect setting for relaxed outdoor entertaining.

The ground floor also accommodates a versatile bedroom, a separate laundry and a convenient powder room.

Upstairs, two generously proportioned bedrooms offer comfortable accommodation, including a main bedroom with walk-in robe and a second bedroom with built-in robes, both serviced by a stylish two-way central bathroom.

heading: Luxury Living for Rent in the Heart of Malvern
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Enjoy stylish, low-maintenance living in this beautifully presented north-facing residence, ideally positioned within an exclusive low-rise boutique building designed by renowned architects Ewert Leaf. Located just moments from the vibrant shopping and dining precincts of Glenferrie Road and High Street, and close to the open green spaces of Milton Gray Reserve, this home offers exceptional lifestyle convenience. 

Designed with comfort and style in mind, the apartment features three generous bedrooms, including a spacious main bedroom complete with a walk-in robe and private ensuite, while a central bathroom services the additional bedrooms. 

The light-filled open-plan living and dining area is framed by full-height windows and doors that capture abundant natural light. Elegant European oak flooring and a warm palette of natural textures create a sophisticated yet inviting atmosphere, with seamless indoor-outdoor flow. 

The designer kitchen will impress home cooks and entertainers alike, boasting marble benchtops, a spacious pantry, and fully integrated appliances by Miele, ideal for both everyday meals and entertaining guests. 

Additional features include: 
- Full-size walk-in laundry with direct access to the courtyard 
- Separate study, perfect for working from home 
- Two secure car spaces plus a storage cage 
- Heating and cooling in all bedrooms and the living area 
- Expansive private outdoor courtyard (approx. 100sqm) 
- Video intercom entry and secure lift access 
- Rear pedestrian access via laneway 

Situated within easy walking distance of Malvern Central, local cafés, restaurants, parks, public transport, and leading schools, this residence offers an outstanding rental opportunity in one of Malvern’s most sought-after locations. 

**To Inspect**

To book an inspection, click either the ‘Request Online Inspection Link’ or ‘Get in Touch’ then select ‘Request an Inspection’ to enter your details. An inspection invitation will then be sent to you via our application platform. If there are no available inspection times, or you cannot attend the listed time, please send an enquiry or contact the leasing agent for further assistance. Please note ‘add to plan’ is not booking into the inspection.

**Please Note** 

Open for Inspection times and property availability is subject to change without notice. We highly recommend registering for an inspection you are going to attend to avoid disappointment for cancellations. If you are registered for an inspection, you will be notified by SMS if the inspection is cancelled. 

**Caution** 

Marshall White has exclusive leasing rights to this property. We do not advertise on Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace or any other social media platforms. Please beware of scammers and apply only via the official advertising link using the Snug platform.

heading: Architectural Elegance Meets Parkside Luxury in the Heart of Prahran
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions

Set within a secure, boutique architecturally designed building, this exclusive residence at 101/6 Sydney Street, Prahran offers refined apartment living in a tightly held development that reflects the exceptional quality found within. With a low-density layout and FOB-controlled secure access, the building provides both privacy and peace of mind, while its considered design elevates it well beyond a standard apartment complex.
Upon entering the apartment, you are welcomed into a beautifully appointed, north-facing residence designed for both luxury and liveability. An expansive open-plan living and dining area is framed by floor-to-ceiling windows and softened by sheer curtains, allowing natural light to flood the space throughout the day. The gourmet kitchen features premium Gaggenau appliances, including an integrated fridge, freezer and dishwasher, and is complemented by a walk-in pantry with a built-in safe for exceptional functionality.
Each bedroom includes a private ensuite, with the master ensuite offering the added comfort of heated flooring. A separate full laundry enhances everyday practicality, while secure basement parking provides two side-by-side car spaces and a dedicated storage cage, completing this exceptional offering.
Ideally positioned directly opposite Orrong Park Tennis Centre and the Prahran Cricket Club, this address delivers an enviable lifestyle. Enjoy the ease of being within walking distance of High Street’s cafes, restaurants and shopping, along with close proximity to highly regarded schools including Loreto. This premium parkside location offers the perfect balance of greenery, connectivity and urban sophistication.
Key Features
- North-facing, light-filled interiors
- Floor-to-ceiling windows with sheer curtains
- Gaggenau kitchen appliances
- Integrated fridge, freezer & dishwasher
- Walk-in pantry with built-in safe
- Heated flooring to master ensuite
- Separate full laundry with washing machine and dryer included
- TV and sound bar included 
- Secure boutique building with FOB access
- Two side-by-side basement car spaces
- Storage cage
- Opposite Orrong Park precinct
- Walk to High Street & elite schools

heading: Family Perfection
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions

This completely renovated four bedroom family home in great location offers an abundance of space for the growing family. The front of the home comprises two bedrooms and a sparkling central bathroom or main bedroom and formal living. The central kitchen offers ample cupboards (with stainless steel appliances and a dishwasher) overlook dining room and separate large family room with open fireplace (decorative only) and north facing sliding doors to garden area. At the rear of the property there are two further bedrooms with built in robes, second bathroom, separate laundry along with children's living area. The home has gas central heating throughout, ducted air conditioning, large gardens (garden maintenance included) and ample off street parking with gates at the front of the property. Enviably situated in a leafy pocket close to Waverley Rd shops and cafes, East Malvern station, Waverley Oval, Chadstone and schools, it delivers instant family appeal.

heading: Enticing Elegance in an Elite Toorak Locale - Fully Furnished
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

FULLY FURNISHED

Commanding a blue-chip position just moments from Como Park, Toorak Village and the Royal South Yarra Tennis Club, this distinguished Georgian residence presents a rare fusion of timeless elegance, grand proportions and effortless, low-maintenance luxury.

Bathed in natural light, a wide reception hall with richly toned parquetry floors creates a warm and sophisticated first impression, flowing through to a refined study, an elegant formal bar and entertaining zone, and an expansive sitting room. Here, a marble gas fireplace opens onto a private north-facing terrace, ideal for intimate gatherings or quiet retreat.

The home’s refined aesthetic continues with parquetry timber floors extending into the sleek stone gourmet kitchen and generous open-plan dining domain. Bi-fold doors seamlessly connect the interior to a beautifully landscaped north-east courtyard, creating a private sanctuary for year-round enjoyment.

Upstairs, the luxurious main suite enjoys elevated views across the city skyline and Como Park, complete with its own balcony, walk-through robes and a lavish marble ensuite with spa bath. Two additional double bedrooms uphold the home’s exacting standards, each featuring walk-in robes and beautifully appointed marble ensuites.

Immaculately presented throughout, the residence is further enhanced by a comprehensive suite of premium inclusions including security alarm and intercom, ducted vacuum, powder room, laundry and an internally accessed double garage.

A residence of enduring prestige in one of Melbourne’s most coveted addresses ,refined, private and effortlessly luxurious.

title: 22 Millicent Avenue, Toorak, 3142
heading: Executor’s Auction - Landmark Setting, Grand Proportions
description_plain:
Offered for the first time in over 40 years, this freestanding solid brick Edwardian presents an exceptional opportunity to personalise and grow in a prized pocket just moments from Beatty Avenue. Set on a wide 697sqm (approx) allotment, rich in period presence and filled with northern light, it delivers immediate comfort alongside outstanding scope to renovate, extend or completely transform for contemporary living (STCA).

The existing three-bedroom layout is generous and thoughtfully arranged, providing a strong foundation for future plans. A formal living room at the front captures brilliant sunlight and retains high ceilings and a marble open fireplace, while a separate sitting room with its own fireplace adds flexibility for evolving needs. Three bedrooms include a main with split system heating and cooling, with the third enhanced by full-height library storage and direct access to the rear, joined by a central bathroom, a second bathroom with integrated laundry and kitchen/meals areas.

At the rear, a deep garden, and a freestanding garage highlight the breadth of the property, and the potential to introduce an architectural extension, pool, or landscaped entertaining domain. Surrounded by leading schools and only moments from cafes, Toorak Station, Hawksburn Village and Orrong Park, it promises a highly connected family lifestyle with every amenity within easy reach.

title: G06/3 Hurstmon Street, Malvern East, 3145
heading: Architect-Designed Garden Residence
description_plain:
Designed by acclaimed architects Telha Clarke, ‘Hurstmon’ is distinguished by its striking columned façade and tightly held collection of sophisticated residences, delivering exceptional contemporary comfort in the heart of Malvern East.
Completed in 2023, this remarkable ground-floor three-bedroom garden residence presents a refined statement of minimalist luxury and privacy, perfectly suited to discerning downsizers or families seeking a low-maintenance lifestyle without compromise. Bathed in natural light, expansive double-glazed floor-to-ceiling windows frame tranquil garden outlooks from every room, while the generous living and dining domain flows seamlessly to a landscaped terrace bordered by established greenery, creating an inviting indoor-outdoor sanctuary.

Designed for effortless entertaining, the gourmet kitchen showcases stone benchtops, bespoke cabinetry, a full suite of Swiss-made V ZUG appliances and an adjoining butler’s pantry with integrated Fisher & Paykel refrigeration. Three spacious bedrooms feature custom built-in robes, two with direct garden access, while the serene main suite includes a fitted dressing room and luxurious ensuite. Comprehensive appointments include European oak floors, pure NZ wool carpets, stone surfaces throughout, designer bathrooms with excellent storage, a full-size laundry, extensive cabinetry, zoned heating and cooling, video intercom, CCTV security, auto-irrigated gardens, a 7.5sqm storage cage and secure basement parking for two cars via dual security gates.

Perfectly positioned between the leafy expanses of Hedgeley Dene Gardens and Dorothy Laver Reserve, and moments to transport, cafés, bike trails and local shopping, this exceptional residence delivers boutique luxury in one of Melbourne’s most desirable lifestyle locations.

title: 5/29 Kensington Road, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Executive Excellence in an Elite Precinct
description_plain:
Stylish, spacious and secure, this stunning executive residence’s sun-drenched dimensions deliver unbeatable low maintenance inner urban living on the edge of South Yarra’s fabulous shopping, restaurant and lifestyle precinct.

Serenely set back from the street, the inviting entrance foyer leads up to a generous dining room with its own private terrace, a gourmet kitchen appointed with stone benches and European appliances and the sun-drenched living and dining room all featuring rich timber floors. Two sets of bi-fold doors open the living space a tranquil north-facing paved courtyard with a vine covered wall and built in bench seat. Skylit stairs lead up to a landing study nook, the main bedroom with designer ensuite and built in robe, two additional robed bedrooms and a stylish bathroom. A sensational retreat/second living room on the basement level is ideal as a media/yoga room or home office. 

Literally metres from Toorak Rd shops, cafes and restaurants, Como cinemas, Chapel St, trams, South Yarra station, schools and Como Park, it includes video intercom, ducted heating/cooling, double glazing, plantation shutters, powder-room, Euro-laundry, storage and basement parking for 2 cars.

title: 8 Montrose Court, Toorak, 3142
heading: Landmark Christopher Doyle Home in Prestigious Setting
description_plain:
Expressions of Interest Close Monday 16 March 3:00pm
Inspect By Private Appointment at the Advertised Times 

In an exclusive cul-de-sac bordered by Melbourne’s most finest homes, this architecturally designed, lift-connected contemporary residence by Christopher Doyle is constructed to exacting standards, offering an uncompromised lifestyle. Set within a magnificent north-facing pool and landscaped surroundings close to elite schools and revered shopping precincts, it forms a sanctuary of style, substance and privacy that extends over three impeccably curated levels.

Parquet de Versailles oak flooring, bespoke gas fireplaces, and polished limestone establish a refined foundation, introducing a grand foyer where a domed ceiling, opulent chandelier, and imperial staircase create an astounding first impression. Formal sitting and dining rooms extend to striking gardens and a marble kitchen with a butler’s pantry, leading into casual living and dining areas that connect seamlessly to the breathtaking rear garden. Multiple terraces form an unparalleled outdoor entertaining zone, including the impressive pavilion with BBQ, appliances, and integrated refrigeration. Sculpted greenery framed by a rose garden, irrigated lawns, and a heated in-ground pool and spa create an idyllic backdrop to every seasonal occasion, enriched by an outdoor fireplace and remote-controlled blinds.

Occupying the entire upper level, the main bedroom suite is defined by a sitting room with a gas fire, dual walk-in robes, and a central marble ensuite. A broad north-facing terrace extends outward, while a home office, intelligently zoned for private lift accessibility is matched by an adjacent powder room. Two expansive bedroom suites and a versatile, self-contained one-bedroom wing on the lower level with independent entry further the luxurious accommodation.

Finished to the highest standard with a temperature-controlled wine cellar, dedicated gym, multi-zone heating and cooling, several powder rooms, poolside bathroom, large laundry, automated irrigation, video security and alarm, video intercom, and remote garaging for six beyond dual-gated access. 
Land: 1,590sqm (approx).

title: 1/10a Stables Lane, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Evocative Light-filled Hideaway
description_plain:
Private Sale Close Tue 17 March 5.00pm

A contemporary urban hideaway with a sophisticated lifestyle edge, this evocative two bedroom, two bathroom townhouse has been brilliantly organised over three light-letting levels in a surreal, zero-traffic setting. Double glazed and with a light-letting northern aspect, the home is efficiently tucked away between the tranquility of Surrey Park and all the iconic vibrancy of Chapel Street and Toorak Road. 

Appointed with Miele appliances that include an integrated dishwasher, the kitchen / dining / living is a sleek and confident space where stone benches are complemented by plenty of timber-toned cabinetry as it extends outdoors to an undercover terrace that draws plenty of northern and afternoon sun. Accessed securely via intercom entry and with the added prize of non-stacker parking, the home also features double glazed bedrooms with their own terraces, an ensuite with walk-in shower and a second bathroom, as well reverse cycle heating / air conditioning. 

From this world class lifestyle pocket, you are sure to celebrate a lifestyle filled with some of Melbourne’s most revered cafes, bars and restaurants, as well as trams in all directions, trains from South Yarra Railway Station and easy access to Prahran Market.

title: 2 McMicken Lane, Prahran, 3181
heading: Sophisticated Inner-City Living
description_plain:
A statement of sophisticated urban design, this contemporary residence delivers refined style and effortless liveability in a premier Prahran setting. Every detail has been thoughtfully crafted to create a haven of light, space and low-maintenance luxury.

Wide oak floorboards and abundant natural light define the expansive open-plan living and dining area, complemented by a sleek Miele-appointed kitchen with integrated fridge/freezer and elegant stone finishes. Glass doors extend to a private, east-facing balcony offering the perfect backdrop for morning coffee or relaxed entertaining. Cleverly designed sliding walls conceal a generous second living room that easily transforms into a third or guest bedroom complete with an adjacent bathroom.

Downstairs, two spacious bedrooms each feature built-in robes and pristine en suites, including one that spills out to a tranquil courtyard retreat. Additional highlights include zoned heating and cooling, an alarm system, video intercom, Euro laundry and internal garage access, ensuring absolute comfort and convenience.
Perfectly positioned just moments from Hawksburn Village, High Street boutiques and an array of renowned dining options, this location captures the very best of Prahran’s vibrant lifestyle. Orrong Park and public transport are within easy reach, making this home an exceptional choice for those seeking sophisticated urban living in a prized inner-city enclave.

title: 11 Hornby Street, Windsor, 3181
heading: Single-Level Sanctuary in The Heart of Windsor
description_plain:
A solid-brick Californian bungalow of genuine quietude, this single-level residence pairs timeless character with an enviably connected Windsor address, steps from Windsor Deli and Chris Gahan Reserve. A sought-after lifestyle setting, moments to Chapel Street and High Street’s dining and wine bars, boutiques, cafés and supermarkets, Prahran Market nearby, and effortless access to the CBD via nearby arterials, trams and trains.

A front bedroom is beautifully scaled, while the central living room offers comfort and ambience around an open fireplace. This space can also be closed off to create a third bedroom if desired, making the floorplan ideal for those who value flexibility. The main bedroom is appointed with Japanese-style built-in robes, and is serviced by a crisp, skylit ensuite. A second bathroom adds further practicality with a walk-in shower and separate bathtub, complemented by a sizeable European laundry with sink and ample storage.

At the rear, light-filled open-plan living and dining unfolds to a well-appointed kitchen with a central island and breakfast bar, induction cooktop, integrated dishwasher, dual sink and abundant bench and cabinetry space. Expansive double glazing captures afternoon sun and opens to a generous covered timber deck for alfresco dining and relaxation, with steps down to a private rear lawn framed by a lush bamboo boundary.

Right-of-way laneway access provides coveted, secure off-street parking via a single carport, which is also well-suited for extra storage or a workshop. Additional highlights include hydronic heating, split-system heating/cooling, Baltic pine and Tasmanian oak floors, excellent storage, freshly painted interiors, roof solar panels, 3,200L water tanks and an upgraded NBN fibre connection throughout the property.

Enjoy easy access to Windsor Station, trams in every direction, and leading primary and secondary schools such as St Michael's Grammar, with this quiet, connected address delivering a compelling urban base with long-lasting appeal.

title: 8 Beaver Street, Malvern East, 3145
heading: “Meledor” - Timeless Edwardian Elegance in the Heart of the Gascoigne Estate
description_plain:
Perfectly set in a quiet, tree-lined pocket of the coveted Gascoigne Estate, "Meledor" is a distinguished c1906 Edwardian residence combining timeless elegance with generous family proportions for modern day lifestyle and living.

Beyond its charming façade, a welcoming entrance hall leads into grand interiors showcasing ornate ceilings, leadlight windows, and exquisite period detailing. The open-plan living and dining area effortlessly blends classic character with modern functionality, while the spacious family domain is complemented by a beautifully updated kitchen featuring premium Bosch appliances and a Butler’s pantry. Designed for both everyday living and entertaining on a grand scale, the layout flows seamlessly to a private, landscaped garden with a serene water feature, service yard, and inviting alfresco spaces.
Accommodation is thoughtfully zoned for family life. The main bedroom offers a luxurious retreat with built-in robes and ensuite, while additional bedrooms with built-in robes are served by a stylish bathroom and separate powder room. A dedicated home office enhances flexibility for modern living.

Practical features include a separate laundry, ducted gas heating, split-system air conditioning, alarm system, irrigation, off-street parking for two cars, and abundant storage throughout.

Moments from Central Park, top schools, shops, cafés, trams, and trains, this magnificent Edwardian home presents an unparalleled lifestyle opportunity where period grandeur meets contemporary comfort.
