title: 2/4 Carmelo Avenue, Malvern East, 3145
heading: Boutique Villa with Garden Privacy
description_plain:
Situated in a delightful, leafy cul-de-sac in a prime lifestyle setting, this stylishly refurbished, single-level contemporary villa sits within a quiet, boutique complex of only three, with entirely private garden spaces and a refreshed, light-filled layout that makes easy living a breeze. Offering an ultra-convenient, low-maintenance lifestyle and an ideal opportunity for retirees scaling down, young professionals or families seeking a convenient entry into a sought-after pocket.

An attractive brick façade and immaculate gardens introduce the sun-drenched interior, which features oversized Colonial-style windows and a fresh white décor, complemented by brand new pale grey carpets. Flowing from the combined living and dining zone, the well-appointed kitchen and meals area connects directly to the north-west wrap-around courtyard, creating a private, low-maintenance setting ideal for relaxed entertaining. Three zoned bedrooms with robes include two on the northern side, with a spacious bathroom, while the main bedroom at the front enjoys a walk-in robe and an ensuite.

Freshly painted and appointed with a large laundry, split-system air conditioning, central heating, ducted vacuum and a wide double lock-up garage, it’s move-in ready and brilliantly located near schools, East Malvern station, Gardiners Creek, Chadstone and freeway access, with local cafés and shopping just a short walk away.

title: 241 Kooyong Road, Toorak, 3142
heading: 1930s Elegance within an Exclusive Cul-De-Sac
description_plain:
Elevated within a prestigious cul-de-sac and oriented to sweeping eastern views, this thoughtfully renovated c1930s solid brick home, free from any heritage restrictions, sits privately within landscaped, north-west oriented poolside gardens on 658sqm*, forming a refined yet relaxed setting suited to every stage of family living.

A steel-framed custom entry reveals light and greenery from the formal garden, leading to a gracious sitting room defined by colonial windows and double doors opening to the trees beyond, while an elegant living room with a marble open fireplace offers a warm, inviting space to unwind.

Sun-drenched and north-west facing, the expansive dining zone transitions to the outside through steel-framed bi-fold doors, allowing effortless connection to the covered alfresco with a gas-plumbed barbecue and terrace. The beautifully appointed kitchen showcases Signorino marble surfaces and a solid marble island, appointed with a Falcon dual-oven stove, Miele dishwasher and Vintec wine fridge, complemented by a substantial walk-in pantry, extensive storage throughout the meals area, and French colonial doors opening to the upper terrace and heated mineral pool.

Designed for guests or independent living, the self-contained pool house includes an ensuite, kitchenette, crazy-paved floors, and bi-fold doors on both sides, offering seamless movement between indoors and out. 

Upstairs, freshly carpeted accommodation comprises a generous main bedroom with a walk-in robe, a sky-lit ensuite and a Juliette balcony, three additional bedrooms, and a large family bathroom with a skylight.

Further highlights include an oversized two-car garage with internal access to the house, hardwood floors, hydronic and ducted heating, reverse-cycle air conditioning, solar-heated pool, outdoor shower, secure keypad entry, marble powder room and laundry with drying cupboard. The prestigious location offers a very short walk to St Catherine’s School, St Kevin’s College and Heyington Station while other leading schools, transport and Kooyong and Toorak Villages are nearby.

*approximate land size

title: 43 Aberdeen Road, Prahran, 3181
heading: Breathtaking Design in Captivating Garden Surrounds
description_plain:
Behind a veil of established greenery in a blue-chip Hawksburn Village address, this double-fronted Victorian has been reimagined through a meticulous architectural renovation, resulting in a residence that lives and breathes with its surrounding gardens.

Beyond a high-fenced entry and off-street gated parking for two, a wisteria-draped verandah introduces Baltic pine floors and high square set ceilings through the central hallway, establishing refined proportions that continue through a series of elegant rooms. The main bedroom enjoys a walk-in robe and study lined with custom storage and a sky-lit ensuite with dual timber vanity and brass fittings, while a second robed bedroom with an open fireplace and a central living room opening through French doors to a private side garden reinforces the stunning seclusion. As the layout unfolds, the contemporary extension sits within walls of floor-to-ceiling glass, erasing the line between house and garden. The gourmet kitchen, fitted with Miele appliances and integrated refrigeration, flows to sliding doors and a covered deck set against dense, curated planting, whilst polished concrete grounds the sunken living and dining zone where towering retractable glass walls slide open to expand the entire space for grand-scale entertaining.

Upstairs, two further bedrooms with robes – One with a built in desk, are complemented by a stylish third bathroom. Finished with split-system air conditioning, ducted heating, irrigation, intercom, a laundry, a powder room, and off-street parking for two, this breathtaking home delivers exceptional turn-key living within steps of Hawksburn Village, Hawksburn Station, trams, and leading schools.

title: 17 Brunel Street, Malvern East, 3145
heading: Elegant Family Living Near Central Park
description_plain:
A canopy of trees lines Brunel Street and frames this exceptional family home where period character and contemporary living coexist effortlessly. A preferred north-facing rear aspect floods the home with natural light, setting the tone for the warm, inviting spaces within.
Generous proportions define the interior, high ceilings, an arched hallway, and a flowing two-level floorplan that adapts to the rhythms of family life. The ground floor offers a versatile study or additional bedroom, a main bedroom with walk-in robe and pristine ensuite, a formal sitting room with cosy open fireplace, a powder room, and access to cellar below. Upstairs, three spacious bedrooms with built-in robes, a family bathroom with spa bath, separate powder, storage room and expansive attic space.
At the heart of the home, a generous family living and dining room connects seamlessly to a stylish entertainer’s kitchen equipped with granite benchtops and Blanco and Bosch appliances, with adjacent laundry. Step outside to a sun-drenched deck, overlooking a garden sanctuary with a solar-heated pool and spa and a pool house with kitchenette and bathroom, a private retreat for effortless entertaining. Further features include a cellar, a large remote double garage with secure internal access, ample storage, ducted heating and vacuum and reverse-cycle air conditioning. 
This substantial family home is enviably positioned between Central Park and the Hedgeley Dene Gardens. With easy access to Caulfield campus Monash University and many of Melbourne’s finest schools, including Lloyd Street, St Mary’s, Caulfield Grammar, Korowa and Sacre Coeur. Also close to local cafes, restaurants and wine bars plus Malvern, Armadale and Chadstone shopping precincts. A few minutes from public transport options or the Monash Freeway/CityLink to the CBD or Mornington Peninsula, offering a sought-after and convenient family lifestyle. 
Land size: 674sqm approx.

title: 5 Culshaw Street, Toorak, 3142
heading: Lifestyle, Privacy and Village Proximity
description_plain:
Comprehensively renovated while preserving its circa 1915 heritage, this captivating solid brick Edwardian delivers a considered approach to contemporary indoor-outdoor living in an exclusive cul-de-sac moments from Beatty Avenue and Hawksburn Village.

Beyond a secure, high-fenced garden entry, gorgeous period detail within leadlight windows and high ceilings is complemented by skylights and richly toned oak floors, drawing warmth and light into every space. Three generous bedrooms, each appointed with extensive built-in robes, line the hallway, with the main enjoying an eastern garden outlook through a stunning bay window. Expansive living and dining areas to the rear transition for modern-day ease, supported by a stone kitchen with waterfall benchtops and premium stainless steel appliances, positioned to overlook both the interior living zones and alfresco setting. Bi-fold doors allow seamless movement outdoors, creating a genuine second living zone for hosting or unwinding beside a gas fire, with an Vergola ceiling overhead and a gas fireplace encouraging year-round use in total seclusion and lush privacy.

A contemporary bathroom with a freestanding bath continues the light-filled allure, alongside a laundry, ducted heating and evaporative cooling, attic storage, plantation shutters, wide side access, and an OFP within the main living area. From this peaceful address, Orrong Park, Beatty Avenue cafés, Hawksburn’s dining and boutique shopping, trams and Toorak Railway Station are all within easy walking distance, delivering a highly connected lifestyle for those seeking single-level serenity.

title: 1/42 Grandview Grove, Prahran, 3181
heading: Period Elegance in Prestigious Precinct
description_plain:
Displaying grand proportions and evocative elegance, this utterly captivating ground level garden residence within a landmark c1930’s boutique enclave delivers a serene, secure and spacious inner urban lifestyle only metres to Hawksburn Village.
Behind the welcoming double door entry, timber floors, ornate ceilings and leadlight windows are highlighted in the wide entrance hall, expansive living room, elegant dining room and an inviting home office overlooking the gardens. Filled with northern light, the spacious separate kitchen is superbly appointed. The two double bedrooms with built in robes are accompanied by a recently renovated bathroom. 
In a location prized for its easy access to Hawksburn Village, High St shops and cafes, Toorak Village, Chapel St, Beatty Ave, Toorak station, trams and Orrong Park, it includes hydronic heating, RC/air-conditioner, on title laundry and lock up garage.

title: 10 Barkly Avenue, Armadale, 3143
heading: Enticing Style, Enviable Lifestyle
description_plain:
Stylishly refurbished throughout, this sensational solid brick balconied residence immediately impresses with its generosity of space, sun-drenched ambience and unbeatable lifestyle location literally metres to Glenferrie Road’s fabulous restaurants and shops.
Timber floors flow through the entrance hall to a generous sitting room bathed in northern light and to the expansive open plan living and dining room with a designer wood fire heater and gourmet kitchen appointed with stone benches and Miele appliances. Glass sliders connect the living space to an entirely private decked garden oasis with a double garage at the rear. Skylit stairs lead up to the main bedroom with north-facing balcony, designer ensuite and built in robes, two additional robed bedrooms and a stylish bathroom with bath.
Just steps from Glenferrie Road, High Street, Malvern Central, Malvern station, trams, excellent schools and Union Street Park, it includes plantation shutters, ducted heating/cooling, remote sky light blinds, powder-room, laundry and wine room/storage.

title: 22A Carrum Street, Malvern East, 3145
heading: Remarkable Space, Single Level, At the Front of Only Two & No Owners Corporation
description_plain:
Entirely independent and positioned at the front of only two, this simply delightful single level residence presents a unique opportunity for downsizers, families or lifestyle seekers to enjoy house-like space with excellent easy-care convenience. 
With Chadstone Shopping Centre at the end of the street and a quiet, low-traffic setting to come home to, this oversized, street-front three-bedroom residence offers genuine walkable convenience, with transport, schools and parkland all close by, supporting a low-maintenance lifestyle in a tightly held, ultra-central pocket.
A rose-lined garden approach leads into naturally bright single-level interiors, revealing a well-considered, zoned layout with three robed bedrooms and two bathrooms, including a generous main suite with its own ensuite. To the rear, expansive living and dining areas feel entirely private, supported by a substantial, well-appointed kitchen, while sliding glass doors extend the space to a sunlit wraparound courtyard designed for relaxed living and entertaining.
Beautifully presented with split system heating and cooling, CCTV security, solar panels, quality window furnishings, a large laundry with utility yard access and a double garage with internal entry, it’s an ideal option for those looking to downsize, invest or start fresh in a prime location with no body corporate and a location that places multiple bus services, Oakleigh’s Eaton Mall, train stations, quality schools and the M1 all within easy reach.

title: 24 Grosvenor Street, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Spectacular in Scale, Style and Luxury
description_plain:
Expressions of Interest Close Tuesday 31 March at 5.00pm

Exceeding all expectations in terms of its remarkable proportions, elite quality, visionary style and technological sophistication, this brand new architecturally striking 316sqm approx residence delivers the ultimate in inner urban family luxury.
Behind the Robertsons brick exterior profile, 2.9m ceilings and doors, limed European oak floors, premium stone and bespoke joinery are showcased throughout. A broad gallery introduces an elegant sitting room overlooking the private north-facing forecourt. The palatial open plan living and dining room with a gas log fire and cleverly concealed cocktail bar with Vintec fridge is capably served by a chef’s kitchen appointed with sleek V-Zug ovens, integrated Miele fridge/freezer, 2 dishwashers, marble benches and a butler’s pantry. Full height glass stacking sliders open the living spaces seamlessly to the beautiful private landscaped garden with stone entertaining terrace, built in concrete seating and a deluxe BBQ. Beneath a circular skylight, the curved staircase leads up to the opulent main bedroom enjoying city views and featuring a lavish marble en suite with freestanding bath and walk in robe. There are also two additional robed bedrooms, a stylish bathroom with freestanding bath and an expansive retreat or 4th bedroom.
In a location prized for its proximity to Chapel St and Toorak Rd’s fabulous shops, cafes and restaurants, Sth Yarra station, trams and Prahran Market, it is comprehensively appointed with an alarm, video intercom, CCTV, RC/air-conditioning, Sonos sound system, remote internal and external blinds, double glazing, powder-room, laundry, irrigation, abundant storage, solar panels and internally accessed 2-car garage with epoxy floors.

title: 43 Airlie Avenue, Prahran, 3181
heading: Elevated family living in a premier Prahran address
description_plain:
Positioned on one of Prahran’s premier avenues and now enhanced by recent cosmetic upgrades, this beautifully maintained family home presents with fresh paintwork, refined finishes and rejuvenated landscaping that further elevate its already impressive appeal. Set within a lush, newly refreshed garden in a tranquil cul-de-sac, the home delivers a practical and luxurious environment for modern family living.

A striking arrangement of expansive windows and doors connects the interiors to a sun-drenched north-facing deck, flooding the open-plan living and dining domain with natural light. A generous open fireplace anchors the space, while the sophisticated kitchen - featuring a substantial concrete island bench, stainless steel surfaces and premium Zug and Bosch appliances - caters effortlessly to both everyday living and large-scale entertaining.

Additional living zones include a formal lounge and a well-appointed home office, complemented by a separate first-floor study area, offering flexibility and privacy for growing families. Four robed double bedrooms ensure excellent accommodation, headlined by a luxurious main suite with extensive walk-in robes and a stylish ensuite.

Period details remain a charming feature, now paired with thoughtful updates throughout, while off-street parking adds further convenience. Ideally located just moments from High Street’s renowned cafes, restaurants and boutiques, with nearby parks, reserves and excellent transport links, this is a compelling opportunity in a blue-chip Prahran setting.

title: 7.1/193 Domain Road, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Sophisticated Style on the Botanic Gardens
description_plain:
Exclusively situated in “Domain Park”, the landmark mid-century building designed by renowned architect Robin Boyd, this stylishly renovated residence revels in its peerless location directly opposite the Royal Botanic Gardens. 

Commanding magnificent views over the gardens to the city skyline, the generous living room opens to a wide undercover north-facing balcony perfect for outdoor dining and entertaining. The sleek gourmet Poliform kitchen appointed with stainless steel benches, Miele appliances and integrated Liebherr fridge/freezer enjoys views over South Yarra with glimpses of Port Phillip Bay. The king-sized main bedroom with robes and the second robed bedroom also overlook the gardens and city skyline. The stunning designer bathroom features a lavish freestanding bath, separate toilet and Euro-laundry.

The ideal pied a terre just moments to the Domain’s fabulous restaurants and cafes, Anzac station, Toorak Rd shops and restaurants, trams, the Yarra River and elite schools, it includes video intercom, RC/air-conditioning and remote blinds.

title: 15 Kardella Street, Malvern East, 3145
heading: Grand Proportions, Coveted Parkside Position
description_plain:
Positioned between Hedgeley Dene Gardens and Central Park in a tightly held cul-de-sac, this magnificent family home commands one of the area’s most coveted park side positions, enhanced by a north-facing pool and established garden setting that brings greenery and natural light into every principal room. Classical lines, generous proportions, and a brilliantly zoned dual-level design provide privacy and flexibility, with a secure gated entry and formal, low-maintenance gardens leading to a superb family environment centred on indoor and outdoor entertaining.
Richly toned chevron oak floors and high ceilings introduce the formal entry and continue through the expansive ground floor, linking an elegant sitting room with a gas fire and a refined home office with an integrated desk and sitting area that may also serve as a guest bedroom, accompanied by a bathroom and a separate powder room. Defined living and dining zones at the rear surround a substantial stone kitchen appointed with Miele appliances and a walk-in pantry, while bi-fold doors extend to a paved terrace framed by roses, Boston ivy, magnolia, and hydrangea, creating a picturesque backdrop to the elevated pool and alfresco terrace beyond. Upstairs, three spacious bedrooms with robes and desks, plus a central retreat, establish excellent family zoning, complemented by a larger north-facing main suite opening to a private terrace via French doors and featuring a dressing room and a luxurious ensuite with a freestanding bath. 
Flawlessly presented, it is appointed with a remote double garage with internal entry, auto gates to additional off-street parking, ducted heating and cooling, ducted vacuum, extensive storage, a well-equipped laundry with first-floor chute and new carpets throughout. Close to Central Park cafés, Wattletree Road trams, Glenferrie Road’s dining strip, and Malvern Central, and with a choice of premium schools nearby, it presents an outstanding opportunity for turn-key living in a truly prestigious locale. Land size: 631sqm approx.

title: 1855-1857 Malvern Road, Malvern East, 3145
heading: Timeless Edwardian Elegance on 1,018sqm (approx.)
description_plain:
A refined fusion of contemporary open-plan living and sophisticated alfresco entertaining sits in harmony with the enduring circa-1925 Edwardian elegance of ‘Stirling’. Occupying a generous 1,018sqm (approx.) allotment, this substantial residence delivers exceptional versatility with two dedicated work from home spaces, and a fully self-contained in-house apartment, ideally suited to large or multigenerational families, while also offering exciting scope for future development (STCA). Seamless indoor-outdoor living unfolds to a broad wrap-around deck, sun-filled gardens, and a twelve-person spa, creating an exceptional setting for memorable entertaining.
Beyond the wide entrance hall, original period character is beautifully preserved through leadlight windows, finely detailed ceilings, hardwood floors, and ornate Edwardian detailing. Formal lounge and dining rooms are enriched by intricate fireplaces, while a generous study features bespoke floor-to-ceiling shelving. The open-plan living domain is thoughtfully appointed with stone benchtops, European appliances, and warm timber cabinetry, flowing effortlessly outdoors in a way that respectfully complements the home’s heritage.
Adding remarkable flexibility, the independently accessed apartment comprises a bedroom, ensuite, kitchen/living zone, and connection to a north-facing deck. Upstairs, a private parental retreat offers a spacious main bedroom with mirrored robes, an ensuite with elevated outlooks, an expansive terrace, and a substantial additional living area. Remaining bedrooms are well-proportioned and fitted with built-in robes. Further features include secure off-street parking for multiple vehicles, ducted heating, split-system air conditioning, and ducted vacuum.
Surrounded by established parklands, the home enjoys immediate proximity to Stanley Street Reserve, Hedgeley Dene Gardens, and Gardiners Creek, with easy access to High Street and Wattletree Road cafés, Central Park, city trams, Darling Station, and Melbourne’s leading private schools. Land size: 1,018sqm approx.

title: 8 Lang Street, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Secluded South Yarra sanctuary with resort-style outdoor living
description_plain:
Beyond lush, tropical-style gardens, this architecturally designed residence delivers an exceptional sense of sanctuary in a highly connected location. Cleverly designed and expertly constructed over two levels with multiple outdoor zones, this particular home offers rare versatility through a flexible floorplan that supports effortless modern living, while remaining remarkably quiet, secure and private.
Inside, calm neutral tones and blackbutt timber floors introduce a refined, north-facing living and dining domain, complemented by a fitted wine cellar and sleek Miele-appointed kitchen with Caesarstone benchtops, generous bench space and excellent storage. Full-height glazing opens to an expansive courtyard terrace where a manicured star jasmine trellis and verdant boundary create a true oasis. A privately zoned rear wing adds further flexibility with a laundry, powder room and stylish bathroom with underfloor heating and walk-in shower, alongside a superbly scaled bedroom with wall-to-wall robes and terrace access, plus a study/home office or additional bedroom with courtyard connection, forming an independent wing ideal for guests, extended family or a teen retreat.
Upstairs, two additional robed bedrooms enjoy excellent natural light, including a front bedroom opening to a resort-like suspended terrace. A dedicated office station with substantial storage supports modern working life, while a striking Carrara marble bathroom with dual vanities, sculptural shower detailing and picture window outlook delivers a standout statement. The main suite is an inviting retreat with treetop vistas, extensive robes and direct terrace connection. Intercom entry, zoned reverse-cycle heating and cooling, ample storage, upgraded NBN connection, intruder detection alarm system, an automated front gate and off-street parking for up to three cars, including a carport with home-based EV charging, complete the offering.
Positioned to enjoy the very best of South Yarra, this address sits moments to Fawkner Park, the Royal Botanic Gardens, Toorak Road shopping and dining, The Alfred Hospital, city trams Punt Road buses and South Yarra Station, with leading schools nearby including Melbourne Grammar School, Wesley College and Christ Church Grammar School. The result is a rare inner-urban haven where architectural excellence, privacy and versatility combine with a premium lifestyle setting.

title: 27 Anderson Street, Malvern East, 3145
heading: Gorgeous Family Retreat Near Central Park
description_plain:
With mature gardens, this single-level residence delivers rare scale with a floor plan designed to evolve with growing families. Mature boundary trees create privacy from the outset, while a terrace entry opens to beautifully zoned living areas for connection and retreat. 

A formal sitting room captures garden outlooks and connects via French doors to an expansive north-facing paved terrace with glass roof, complemented by a formal dining room with terrace access. Beyond, a casual lounge with extensive storage leads to a sunlit open-plan family meals and kitchen domain. The kitchen is superbly appointed with striking granite benchtops, abundant cabinetry and pantry space, an integrated fridge and freezer, and premium ILVE appliances. A butler’s pantry and integrated laundry enhance everyday functionality. Doors extend the meals zone to a second north-facing terrace and rear courtyard garden, creating multiple alfresco settings for relaxed family time and entertaining.

Accommodation is equally versatile. The main bedroom is a private front retreat with a bay window seating nook, a generous walk-through robe and dressing area, and an ensuite with a marble vanity. A skylit multi-purpose room with built-in robes can be configured as an additional bedroom or home office. Further bedrooms are well serviced by a family bathroom with a marble vanity, spa bath and separate shower, plus powder rooms for guests. 

A secondary wing offers even more flexibility with a further robed bedroom and media room/bedroom - and a central kitchenette, ideal multi-generational living. Downstairs, an oversized double garage with internal access and storage is complemented by rear roller-door access to Gillman Street and additional parking, providing on-site capacity for a third car.

Positioned for easy family living, this secure haven is moments to Central Park, cafes and shops, East Malvern Station, Malvern Valley Primary School, Hedgeley Dene Gardens with nearby access to Glenferrie Road.

title: 7 Stonehaven Avenue, Malvern East, 3145
heading: Timeless Elegance in a Leafy Family Setting
description_plain:
Set within a picturesque, tree-lined avenue, this captivating family residence showcases the timeless elegance of Old English design, beautifully enriched with enduring period character. Commanding immediate street presence with its rendered and feature brick façade, soaring rooflines and charming dormer windows, the home rests on a generous 576sqm (approx.) garden allotment with a prized northern rear aspect, an exceptional setting for family living.
Gracefully retaining its Art Deco heritage, the home reveals exquisite diamond leadlight windows, decorative ceilings, picture rails and era-inspired light fittings, thoughtfully preserved to honour its provenance. The refurbished interior, unfolding over two expansive levels, presents in superb condition, ready to move in and enjoy while also offering exciting scope to further enhance or reconfigure to suit your evolving family needs (STCA).
Downstairs dimensions include an elegant formal sitting room with adjoining dining room, an inviting informal living domain, dedicated study/home office and a family bathroom with integrated laundry. Upstairs, four bedrooms provide exceptional accommodation, highlighted by a main retreat with walk-in robe and serviced by a second family bathroom.
At the heart of the home, a stylishly appointed kitchen and dining zone is equipped with a butler’s pantry and premium Bosch and Miele appliances, seamlessly extending to a terrace that overlooks a lush, private tropical-inspired garden, a serene sanctuary for entertaining or quiet relaxation.
Additional features include ducted heating, Daikin cooling (upstairs), reverse-cycle air conditioning to the kitchen, security cameras, open fireplace, quality appointments throughout, abundant storage, original garage/storage and off-street parking.
Positioned within one of the district’s most family-favoured pockets, the home enjoys outstanding proximity to Chadstone Shopping Centre and cinema complex, Terminus Village and Darling Road cafés, Darling Station, Waverley Road trams and bus services. The scenic Gardiners Creek trails are moments away, along with an array of highly regarded schools including Lloyd Street Primary School, Korowa Anglican Girls’ School, Sacré Cœur, Monash University (Caulfield Campus) and Holmesglen Institute, underscoring the exceptional lifestyle opportunity on offer.
Land size: 576sqm (approx.)

title: 16/2 Shipley Street, South Yarra, 3141
heading: An Elegant And Convenient South Yarra Townhouse
description_plain:
Contemporary elegance defines this superb north facing terrace-style townhouse situated in the “Shipley Terrace” complex in the heart of South Yarra. It presents an outstanding opportunity to embrace a chic and vibrant lifestyle without compromising on style or quality. An ideal choice for retirees, young professionals, or small families, this home offers a convenient, low-maintenance lifestyle in an exclusive locale with a myriad of walk-to dining, shopping, and recreation options, delivering unrivalled walk-ability.

A canopy of plane trees along Shipley Street forms a leafy backdrop to this instantly appealing residence. The home is introduced by a hedge-lined sandstone courtyard, providing the perfect setting to enjoy a morning coffee or evening drink. Inside, the north-facing sitting and dining room is flooded with winter sunshine and natural light. This space flows through to a stylish kitchen equipped with quality Bosch and Westinghouse appliances, a concealed laundry, and an informal dining area, all opening through tall French doors to a rear courtyard with access gate.

Upstairs, the elegance continues with two generous bedrooms, both featuring ample built-in robes. The main bedroom includes an ensuite and front balcony, while a second family bathroom with a separate toilet services the home. Residents can enjoy the quiet recreation areas surrounding the heated pool and the north–south tennis court. Additional features include video intercom entry with gate release, reverse-cycle air conditioning in the bedrooms, a cosy gas log fireplace and electric wall heater downstairs, plus remote gate access to basement garaging for two cars and a large storage cage.

This superb home is perfectly positioned just minutes’ walk from everything cosmopolitan South Yarra has to offer, including the fashion outlets, cafés, restaurants, and entertainment options of Toorak Road, Domain Road, and Chapel Street. Enjoy easy access to the Royal Botanic Gardens, Australia’s premier sporting arenas, the Arts precinct, and convenient transport options to the CBD, including South Yarra Station and Toorak Road trams. Yarra walking and cycling tracks, nearby parklands, sought-after private schools, and the Prahran Market further underpin the exceptional lifestyle on offer.

title: 40 Ellerslie Place, Toorak, 3142
heading: Private Art Deco sanctuary in a peaceful cul-de-sac
description_plain:
Securely and privately positioned in a peaceful cul-de-sac, this tightly held 1940s Art Deco residence is an exceptional Toorak home, opening to a picturesque paved courtyard terrace and verdant boundaries that create an immediate sense of seclusion. Set between the coveted Hawksburn and Toorak Villages for dining, boutiques and essentials, this distinctive residence offers a balance of private sanctuary and effortless inner-south convenience. Across two beautifully maintained levels, the solid brick façade sets an elegant tone. Original detail has been preserved with care, from leadlight glazing and richly toned timber doors to intricate ceilings that speak to the era. At the entry, a generous and inviting formal living room with a fireplace flows through sliding glass to the front courtyard, making indooroutdoor living feel seamless, while a refined formal dining room creates an additional space to gather.

An updated self-contained rear zone adds outstanding flexibility, featuring its own secure side entry, a kitchen with excellent cabinetry space, a light-filled north-facing family living domain, a laundry with external access and separate WC, plus a bright and private bedroom with a walk-in robe and ensuite. Upstairs, the beautifully proportioned main bedroom enjoys treetop outlooks, split-system comfort and built-in robes, complemented by two further bedrooms or a bedroom and study, and a family bathroom with a claw-foot bath and pristine original style.

With heating, cooling, ample storage throughout, and a rear shed, this is an exceptional home for families or professionals seeking period integrity, versatile zoning, and a peaceful, connected lifestyle close to Hawksburn Station, Malvern Road, and Toorak Road trams, leading schools, and nearby gardens and parkland.

title: 20 Cloverdale Avenue, Toorak, 3142
heading: Dual Frontage with Panoramic Skyline
description_plain:
Commanding a prestigious position with a second frontage to Vista Grove and garaging from Coverdale Avenue, this near new architect-designed residence by Travis Walton with landscaping by Jack Merlo delivers state-of-the-art living with total privacy and panoramic city views across the greenery of Como Park.
Secure garden entry reveals an impressive architectural form, finished in travertine, oak, and expansive glazing, with a dramatic void over the foyer that introduces three lift-connected levels of beautifully zoned living, entertaining, and wellness. High ceilings and full-height glass enhance light and outlook throughout, beginning with a refined formal lounge with bespoke joinery, before open-plan living and dining capture Melbourne’s iconic skyline and extend to a broad terrace for alfresco dining.
A premium kitchen, appointed with VZUG and Miele appliances, integrated Liebherr refrigeration, travertine surfaces, and a full butler’s pantry, has been designed for lavish entertaining with flawless connections between indoor and outdoor zones. Four luxurious bedrooms, each with walk-in robes and private en-suites, sit above on the upper level, headlined by an impressive city-view main suite with a wraparound fitted dressing room, a deluxe twin bathroom with a bath, and a balcony accessed via full-height stacked glass. The lower level offers further versatility, entered through a gallery-inspired hall that connects the substantial living area to a full wet bar with integrated refrigeration and a divine, secluded courtyard garden. A steam shower within the fifth bathroom supports gym, studio or guest retreat options, creating a highly adaptable environment for evolving lifestyle needs.
Positioned within moments of Toorak Village, the Royal South Yarra Tennis Club, elite schooling, cinemas and restaurants, with Como Park, Yarra trails and freeway access nearby, this exceptional residence also includes secure gated entry to both sides, video intercom, CCTV and alarm, slab heating, solar power, EV provision, Sonos, motorised external and internal blinds, multiple storerooms, an 11.5sqm cellar, and an oversized triple garage with parking capability for additional vehicles.
Enter from Vista Grove for inspections.

title: 60 River Street, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Architectural Edge In South Yarra
description_plain:
An extraordinary architectural reinvention of the former Goodman Knitting Mills, this independent contemporary residence sets a new benchmark for urban living, showcasing impressive proportions, unwavering style and a first-class position moments from Toorak Road, Chapel Street and the Yarra River.

Beyond a discreet, unassuming facade and secure garaging for three, a sleek, industrial influence defines the design, creating genuine live-work versatility across four substantial levels. A fully self-contained wing delivers outstanding flexibility, centred around an expansive office and living domain with extensive storage, a kitchenette and soaring concrete ceilings. Private internal stairs rise to a king-sized bedroom with walk-in robes and a marble-finished ensuite, offering a highly functional solution for guests, multigenerational living, or a refined work-from-home environment.

The main residence unfolds above, linked by a steel floating staircase with timber treads and honed bluestone floors. Two bathrooms and three bedrooms are generously proportioned and feature full-height robes, including one with a private en-suite and light-well connection. Entertaining takes centre stage on the upper level, with Tasmanian oak floors, streamlined joinery and stacked sliding glass opening to a full-width balcony. The Miele kitchen is designed for serious hosting, featuring Corian benchtops, a large island, gas cooking and a full appliance suite including a coffee machine and dishwasher, whilst a dramatic top-level living domain captures the glitter of South Yarra by night and extends to an enormous open-air roof terrace.

Complete with secure garaging for three, hydronic heating, reverse-cycle air conditioning, double glazing, motorised exterior louvres, alarm, intercom, and ample storage, it delivers exclusivity and peerless style within the heart of South Yarra’s dining and shopping precinct, with elite schools, the MCG, Como Park, and multiple transport routes all moments away.

title: 4/16 Finlayson Street, Malvern, 3144
heading: Peaceful and Private Garden Oasis
description_plain:
A tranquil, garden-surrounded oasis cast to the very rear of a boutique collection of just four and positioned in a super-central Malvern cul de sac, this meticulously maintained two bedroom townhouse is effortlessly connected to a landscaped, easy-care backyard that wraps around to embrace the joy of north-facing alfresco entertaining. Offered for the first time in 25 years, the home is technically a townhouse but delivers a house-like energy to suit absolutely everyone from new market entrants and busy professional couples to pet owners, new families and downsizers.

Immaculately presented and ready to be enjoyed, the home features a well-designed European kitchen with electric cooking and a servery-style breakfast bar-connection to dining / living that in turn spills outdoors to a sundrenched north-facing deck and a secure backyard that is privately tree-sheltered. Upstairs, the bedrooms are each appointed with built-in robes and ceiling fans – a split system in the primary bedroom – plus there is bathroom with an independent bathtub and a separate powder room for guest use, as well as a genuine laundry, carport parking and parking for a second vehicle which is not on title but available.

Situated in a super central location with a real lifestyle edge in the highly coveted catchment for Malvern Primary School, the home allows you to walk to great local cafes, all the dining and shopping of Glenferrie Road, Malvern Central Shopping Centre, trams and trains from Malvern Railway station, while both Central Park and Caulfield Park are nearby.

title: 34 Moama Road, Malvern East, 3145
heading: Captivating Style and Elegance
description_plain:
Set in a plane tree–lined streetscape within the Ardrie Estate, this freestanding single-level Federation home blends period charm with contemporary style and offers light-filled, low-maintenance living.
An arched entrance hall with timber floors and high ceilings leads to the main bedroom with designer ensuite and built-in robes, two additional bedrooms with built-in robes, and a stylish bathroom with separate powder room. A soaring vaulted ceiling with high windows enhances the open-plan living and dining area, complemented by a gourmet kitchen with European appliances and stone benchtops. Bi-fold doors open to an awning-covered BBQ deck and private easy-care garden, with potential for secure off-street parking.
Ideally located close to Waverley Road shops, cafés and trams, Caulfield Station, quality schools, Monash University’s Caulfield campus and Ardrie Park. Features include alarm, CCTV, ducted heating, reverse-cycle air-conditioning, laundry and garden shed. Land size approx. 325sqm.

title: 46 Ewart Street, Malvern, 3144
heading: “Glencoe” - A Refined Malvern Classic with Contemporary Family Luxury
description_plain:
Perfectly positioned in one of Malvern’s most admired tree-lined streets, 46 Ewart Street delivers the consummate blend of period grace and modern family comfort. Beautifully renovated and thoughtfully extended, this four-bedroom residence showcases the timeless charm of its heritage origins while offering the scale, flexibility, and sophistication demanded by contemporary living.

Behind its elegant period façade, light-filled living zones provide space for every stage of family life—from relaxed day-to-day enjoyment to effortless large-scale entertaining. High ceilings, original detailing, and warm timber accents sit in harmony with curated modern finishes, creating a home that feels both inviting and refined.

At the heart of the property, the gourmet kitchen overlooks a generous open-plan living/dining room that spills seamlessly to the outdoors. Here, a superb alfresco entertaining terrace and landscaped garden frame a sparkling in-ground pool, forming an idyllic setting for summer gatherings, family celebrations, and quiet weekend relaxation.

Accommodation includes 3/4 beautifully appointed bedrooms, including a serene downstairs master suite, complemented by a luxurious walk-in-robe and ensuite and 2  excellent bedrooms and a retreat upstairs.

Adding rare convenience for the area, the home includes a secure single garage plus additional off-street parking, ensuring practicality matches its appeal.

A short stroll to leading schools including Malvern Primary, boutique shopping, and Malvern’s café culture, this stunning residence offers prestige living in a premier lifestyle location.

 Elegance, Comfort, Family flexibility, 46 Ewart Street is Malvern living at its finest.

title: 1178 Malvern Road, Malvern, 3144
heading: Luxurious Family Residence
description_plain:
Refined finishes with peerless designer style, this luxurious family residence impresses with its simply remarkable indoor and outdoor dimensions, defined by contemporary European elegance with a touch of Hollywood glamour. Enviably located close to elite schools, Glenferrie Road shops and cafes, and Malvern Village, it offers immense family appeal.

Every detail—from the imported light fittings to the oak parquetry floors—reflects attention to quality and design flair. The dramatic reception hall introduces a refined study and handsome formal sitting and dining room. The expansive living and dining area, along with the premium stone and marble Miele kitchen, flows seamlessly to a spectacular Paul Bangay designed private outdoor entertaining precinct featuring a covered heated al fresco terrace and heated pool.

A seductively grand curved staircase ascends to the expansive main bedroom with en-suite, walk-in robe, and balcony, a second double bedroom with walk-in robe and en-suite, plus two additional double bedrooms with walk-in robes and a shared en-suite, complemented by a retreat.

Comprehensively appointed with every modern convenience, including heating and cooling, alarm, video intercom, audio-wiring, ducted vacuum, irrigation, outdoor heaters, laundry, auto gates, and an internally accessed double garage. Land size: 643sqm approx.

title: 50 Ardrie Road, Malvern East, 3145
heading: “Louisville” - Bespoke Design and Luxury
description_plain:
As featured in numerous publications including the Design Files, this utterly captivating 4-bedroom freestanding Victorian residence was brilliantly transformed in c2023 by renowned interior designer   Alexandra Cerny of ByCerny to create a breathtaking domain where sophisticated finishes and family functionality are in complete sync.

Beyond the block-fronted exterior, a double arched hallway featuring oak floors flows through to the spectacular living and dining domain of exceptional proportions warmed by a Phillippe Cheminee wood fire heater. Black steel framed doors reveal a sublime bar/butler’s pantry or providore while the stunning kitchen is beautifully accented with handmade Spanish tiles, brushed aluminium, terrazzo benches, sleek premium appliances and integrated fridge/freezer. Full width and height glass sliders extend the living out to a pergola covered limestone terrace and the private landscaped leafy garden. The beautiful main bedroom with walk in robe and lavish designer en suite, a second robed bedroom and stunning bathroom are on the ground level while striking marble and oak stairs lead up to two additional bedrooms with robes, a stylish bathroom and office/retreat.

Nestled amongst a leafy period streetscape only moments to Ardrie Park, and close to Waverley Rd trams, shops and cafes, Caulfield station, the Caulfield campus of Monash University and schools, it includes an alarm, CCTV, reed security sensors, hydronic heating, RC/air-conditioning, laundry, auto irrigation, underground water tank, auto gate and secure off street parking. 
Land size: 351sqm approx.

title: 3/349 Glenferrie Road, Malvern, 3144
heading: Prized inner-east location combining everyday convenience with peaceful residential living
description_plain:
Secluded and tranquil at the rear of only three boutique villas, this impeccable single-level residence offers refined, low-maintenance living with scale and versatility. The superbly connected location positions this elegant home as an ideal option for those seeking effortless comfort and everyday convenience in a prized inner-east setting.
Beyond a secure dual-door entry, a wide hallway introduces high ceilings and elegant herringbone timber floors. A formal dining room offers versatile space for entertaining or a second living area, with double doors for defined zoning, while the sunlit open-plan living and dining area is enhanced by a fireplace and generous glazing. The impressive kitchen features a waterfall island with breakfast bar and wine storage, paired with ample cabinetry and premium appliances, including a 900mm Smeg oven and five-burner cooktop, adjacent to a casual meals area and charming bay window with external access.
Sliding doors open to an expansive north-facing alfresco terrace, delivering sun-filled, private outdoor living year-round. With its leafy boundary, this beautifully landscaped space is perfectly designed for relaxed outdoor dining and entertaining. 
Three bedrooms are thoughtfully zoned, led by a spacious main suite with walk-in robe and dressing area, and a luxurious ensuite with an oversized rain shower and dual vanities. A sizeable study or second bedroom opens to a side terrace, while a third robed bedroom is serviced by a stylish family bathroom with a rain shower and freestanding bathtub. Ducted heating and cooling, excellent storage, and a pristine laundry with double garage access add comfort, security and day-to-day ease.
Trams, including Route 58 and 72 to the CBD, are moments away, with Armadale and Kooyong Stations also close for swift city access. High Street Armadale and Glenferrie Road place boutiques, cafés, restaurants and everyday services within easy reach, with nearby parks, leading schools, such as Lauriston Girls' School and De La Salle College, adding lifestyle balance to this exceptional lock-and-leave home.

title: 34C Palermo Street, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Sophistication and Style
description_plain:
Spectacular in scale, style and level of finish, this stunning architecturally designed residence’s impressively versatile light-filled dimensions deliver sophisticated inner urban family luxury in a peaceful leafy pocket yet only metres to both Chapel Street and Toorak Road.
Bathed in northern light, lofty ceilings enhance the sense of space in the expansive open plan living and dining room featuring wide oak floors and a sublime gourmet kitchen appointed with marble benches and Miele appliances. Fully opening bi-fold doors connect the living space with a private bluestone paved courtyard, ideal for al fresco dining. Intelligently conceived family accommodation comprises two double bedrooms with robes and stylish en suites and a 4th bedroom or retreat, while on its own level above enjoying city views, the main bedroom features a lavish en suite with freestanding bath, an abundance of robes, a fitted home office area and large sundeck. On the basement level there is a powder-room, garage, storeroom and additional car-space.
In a coveted lifestyle precinct walking distance to cinemas, trams, Surrey Park, Prahran Market, South Yarra station and schools, it includes zoned RC/air-conditioning, laundry and ample storage.

title: 18 Winifred Crescent, Toorak, 3142
heading: Designer Parkfront Serenity
description_plain:
Inspect by Private Appointment at the Advertised Times.

Executed to an uncompromising standard, with remarkable scale and bespoke finishes over a flexible family floor plan, this Wayne Gillespie–designed home establishes a new standard for lavish living and entertaining. Privately concealed behind high walls and a mature Myles Baldwin–designed garden and pool landscape, the impeccably renovated interior is entirely removed from neighbouring outlooks, pulling in northern light and opening seamlessly to verdant outdoor spaces from almost every room.

Impressive interiors unfold across three levels, with a skylit gallery hall and staircase drawing natural light deep into the home and creating an easy connection between living zones. Expansive open-plan living and dining, warmed by an open fireplace and framed by floor-to-ceiling glazing, extend to the alfresco terrace and solar-heated pool with built-in BBQ, served by a premium entertainer’s kitchen finished in marble and European appliances. A generous media room on the same level opens to the lush garden surrounds, while below, a TV or rumpus room sits alongside a glass-encased wine cellar, kitchenette/bar with mirrored storage and integrated appliances, and a well-appointed mudroom, perfect for avid entertainers and large-scale families alike.

An impressively proportioned city- and river-view main bedroom with motorised blinds, dual walk-in robes and an opulent en suite headlines the six-bedroom accommodation upstairs, with two additional guest bedroom with en-suite and a sixth bedroom currently utilised as a home gym. Positioned opposite Winifred Reserve and playground, with immediate access to river trails and close proximity to elite private schools, Toorak Village, Como Park, leading restaurants and the freeway, the setting delivers a first-class lifestyle, comprehensively appointed with an alarm, video intercom, CCTV video, SONOS integrated sound, hydronic heating, garden irrigation, keyless entry, powder room, large laundry and an internally accessed multi-car garage. Land size: 671sqm (approx)

title: 2/2 Peak Street, Malvern East, 3145
heading: Exemplary Executive Luxury
description_plain:
From the spectacular scale to the superior quality and luxurious finishes, every aspect of this architecturally striking contemporary residence celebrates peerless designer style and a flawless attention to detail.
This stunning domain is defined by the remarkable flair of award-winning interior designer, Chris Elliot and garden surrounds curated by the award-winning landscaper, Kihara. In wide gallery featuring oak floors introduces a breathtaking open plan living and entertaining domain where ultra-high ceilings accentuate the space and a gas log fire provides an atmosphere of warmth. A state-of-the-art kitchen appointed with an Italian marble floating bench from Artedomus, Miele appliances and a butler’s pantry deliver culinary efficiency while black steel framed doors extend the living space out to a large undercover terrace plumbed for BBQ’s and the easy-care garden with built in seating. A gate at the rear directly accesses Peverill Park. A downstairs bedroom with walk in robe and designer en suite is ideal for guests while a serene home office is fitted with a limestone desk. Skylit stairs lead up to the beautiful main bedroom with custom walk-in robes, a dressing table and opulent en suite with a freestanding bath, two additional robed bedrooms, a stylish bathroom, generous retreat and fitted study nook.
In a leafy cul de sac yet close to Chadstone, Holmesglen station, schools, Malvern Valley Golf Course, Gardiner’s Creek bike path and freeway access, it includes an alarm, video intercom, zoned RC/air-conditioning, double glazing, powder-room, laundry, storage, water tank, auto gate and internally accessed 2 car garage.

title: 16/621 Toorak Road, Toorak, 3142
heading: Like a Tranquil, Toorak Treehouse
description_plain:
Private Sale Close Tue 24 March 5.00pm

Like a light-filled treehouse, sheltered within a canopy of established foliage, this second floor / top level, single bedroom classic apartment is situated in a prime location in proximity to schools, shops, public transport and the Yarra River.  A new reverse cycle air conditioner will keep the apartment warm in winter and cool in summer; double glazed windows ensure maximum comfort throughout the year.  The functional, compact kitchen has easy access to the meals and living area, while the bathroom with adjoining laundry is rich in character.  The apartment has the convenience of off-street, undercover parking suitable for two small cars, with a secure storage room at the rear.  The apartment also features large built-in robes in the bedroom and the security of an intercom entry.  Brilliant living or investing - with a strong rental return - the apartment is close to cafes, fine dining, shopping at the fashionable Toorak Village, Glenferrie Road and High Street.  The tram into the Melbourne CBD stops directly out front of the building with only a short walk to Kooyong and Heyington Railway Stations.

title: 21 Brunel Street, Malvern East, 3145
heading: Impressive Family Entertainer in a Blue-Chip, Tree-Lined Setting
description_plain:
Set in one of Malvern East’s most tightly held, tree-lined streets just moments from the vibrant Central Park and the natural beauty and tranquillity of Hedgeley Dene Gardens, this impressive four bedroom family residence delivers a compelling blend of refined luxury and exceptional lifestyle appeal.
Beyond its secure entrance porch and inviting façade, the home reveals beautifully maintained interiors designed for effortless modern day living and entertaining.  Immaculately presented and finished to an exacting standard, the curated interiors are highlighted by wide European oak floors, high ceilings and an abundance of natural light. Opening from the hallway at the front of the home and overlooking attractive landscaped gardens is a large study, ideally serviceable as a functional home office. Beyond, generous formal and informal living zones flow seamlessly to the rear, where an inviting alfresco terrace complete with BBQ kitchen and sparkling inground swimming pool form the ultimate outdoor retreat — perfect for relaxed family weekends or for magical evening entertaining on grand scale. The well-appointed kitchen, with its adjacent butler’s pantry, stone benchtops and Miele appliance, sits at the heart of the home, overlooking the outdoor zone and connecting easily to dining and living areas. Upstairs four spacious bedrooms and a generous retreat, all enjoying leafy outlooks of the surrounding foliage, provide excellent accommodation for families of all stages. The generous main bedroom, privately situated at the rear, with its fitted WIR and designer marble ensuite exudes a refined sense of luxury and style. The home also includes ducted heating and cooling, alarm, video intercom, powder room, laundry, double glazing, water tank garage and auto gates.
 Positioned just a short stroll from the tranquil expanses of Hedgeley Dene Gardens and surrounded by prestige homes, this exceptional address also enjoys close proximity to Melbourne’s leading schools, parklands, transport and local village shopping. A rare opportunity to secure a superb family residence in one of Malvern East’s most desirable pockets.
Land size 628sqm approx.

title: 5/1A Washington Avenue, Malvern East, 3145
heading: Sold Off Market
description_plain: In a pleasing result, this superb property has been sold in a private off market transaction. Enjoying a prized Stonnington location offering close proximity to transport options, freeway access, a range of schools, shops, cafes and parks, these leafy suburbs are always in demand.

title: 3/5 Chomley Street, Prahran, 3181
heading: A Private Prahran Oasis
description_plain:
Peacefully tucked away at the rear of the block, where the vibrancy of urban Prahran softens and a sun dappled alfresco bliss takes over, this stylishly refurbished, north-facing garden apartment features two bedrooms and a seamless outdoor connection to tantalize entertainers. Merely metres from High Street and moments from Chapel Street, the apartment is a welcoming private oasis in the electric heart of Prahran.

Bathed in natural northern light and backed by a granite-topped kitchen with Bosch cooking, the open-plan extends outdoors through recently installed double-glazed sliding doors to a deck and paved courtyard that face the north and are delightfully organised under an exotic palm tree. Polished hardwood flooring is complemented by fresh carpets in each the robed bedrooms in this securely gated apartment with video entry and secure undercover parking as well as a fully-tiled bathroom and new split system heating / air conditioning.

Ready to be enjoyed in a dream location just moments from all the cafes, dining, bars and shopping for which Chapel Street is famous, plus you have easy access to Prahran Market, Greville Street, multiple trams and trains from Windsor Railway Station.

title: 3/42 Grandview Grove, Prahran, 3181
heading: Art Deco Charm Meets Spacious Ground-Floor Living
description_plain:
On the ground level of an acclaimed c.1930s boutique enclave, this gracious residence is a true inner-city sanctuary, gazing out to a leafy, tree-lined streetscape that creates a remarkable sense of privacy and calm. Its grand proportions and irreplaceable elegance deliver an irresistible lock-up-and-leave lifestyle just metres from the heart of Hawksburn Village.

Showcasing ornate high ceilings, double glass doors and polished timber floors, a generous central hallway introduces a gracious sitting room, an elegant dining room and a dedicated home office. With exceptional proportions throughout, these light-filled spaces enjoy north-western light and tranquil leafy outlooks, while also offering excellent flexibility, including the opportunity to reconfigure the dining room or home office as an additional ground-level bedroom, if desired.

The spacious, separate kitchen is appointed with an Ilve cooker, while two gorgeous bedrooms are complemented by a stylish bathroom, all enjoying calming southern aspects across lush garden surrounds.

Exceptionally positioned within walking distance of High Street’s renowned shops and cafés, including Morning Market, as well as Sum of Us Pilates Studio, Toorak Station, Beatty Avenue, trams and Orrong Park. Additional features include ducted heating, an on-title laundry, and a remote-controlled garage with under-house storeroom and potential wine cellar.

heading: Private Sanctuary, Premier Pocket
description_plain:
Steps from Glenferrie Road’s café and dining precinct, yet entirely shielded behind garden greenery, this fully renovated three-bedroom contemporary residence delivers idyllic privacy and lifestyle appeal in one of the area’s most sought-after pockets. 

A north-facing orientation and leafy outlooks shape how light moves through the interiors, with natural timber floors flowing throughout the grand entrance hall, introducing two sizeable living areas, one with a northern aspect, the other designed for large-scale family connection and entertaining with a gas fireplace. The stunning kitchen is expansive and streamlined, appointed with stone benchtops, an oversized central island, a walk-in pantry and premium European appliances, including a full-height Liebherr integrated wine fridge. Sliding glass doors invite seamless transitions from indoors to the low-maintenance garden and broad deck, fitted with an automated LouverTec ceiling, two outdoor heaters and western sun blinds, allowing the outdoor zone to adapt easily with the seasons.  

Upstairs, architectural skylights illuminate three genuine queen-sized bedrooms, including the larger main suite with walk-in robes and a private en suite. The two additional bedrooms share a central bathroom, supplemented by a ground-floor powder room. With Malvern and Armadale stations, multiple tram routes, High Street boutiques, Malvern Central, and leading schools all within direct proximity, this turnkey home offers a first-class lifestyle, complete with Daikin fully ducted heating and cooling, a large laundry, a wealth of storage, and a double remote garage via ROW.

heading: Refined, Fully Furnished Luxury in an Exclusive Boutique Setting
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Positioned within a tightly held, architecturally designed boutique development, this exceptional residence delivers a rare offering of scale, refinement and effortless luxury in one of South Yarra’s most coveted pockets.

Architecturally designed by DKO Architecture with interiors by MIM Design, this stunning residence is one of only seven and is defined by exemplary designer style, expansive proportions and lavish finishes. Perfectly located just metres from Toorak Road and Chapel Street’s renowned restaurants and boutiques, Hawksburn Village, Hawksburn Station, trams and Como Park, it delivers a truly peerless lifestyle.

A refined off form concrete façade introduces interiors of striking sophistication, where dark oak flooring flows through a generous entrance hall into an expansive open plan living and dining domain. Framed by full height glazing and leafy outlooks, the space connects seamlessly to a large undercover balcony, creating an idyllic setting for year round indoor outdoor entertaining.

At the heart of the home, a statement kitchen showcases swathes of marble, premium Miele appliances, an integrated Smeg fridge and freezer, and a butler’s pantry, all complemented by a beautifully appointed cocktail bar and wine fridge, perfect for hosting on any scale. 

Fully furnished throughout, the residence has been thoughtfully curated with a sophisticated, layered palette, further enhanced by automated blinds and zoned ducted heating and cooling to ensure year round comfort and ease.

The accommodation is intelligently zoned, as reflected in the floorplan, offering excellent separation between living and bedroom domains. The main bedroom is a luxurious retreat, complete with a dressing room and designer ensuite, while additional bedrooms are generously proportioned and serviced by a beautifully appointed central bathroom.

Additional features include coded security access and the convenience of two secure car spaces.

Enjoy the very best of South Yarra living, with Hawksburn Village just moments away for your morning coffee, boutique grocers and village charm, while Toorak Road and Chapel Street offer an unrivalled selection of dining, shopping and nightlife. Hawksburn Station and nearby trams provide effortless connectivity to the CBD, while the open green expanses of Como Park and the Yarra River trails are within easy reach for weekend walks, runs or a round of golf. This is a location that balances lifestyle, convenience and prestige with ease.

A truly considered residence where design, functionality and lifestyle come together seamlessly. A must inspect!

**To Inspect**

To book an inspection, click either the ‘Request Online Inspection Link’ or ‘Get in Touch’ then select ‘Request an Inspection’ to enter your details. An inspection invitation will then be sent to you via our application platform. If there are no available inspection times, or you cannot attend the listed time, please send an enquiry or contact the leasing agent for further assistance. Please note ‘add to plan’ is not booking into the inspection.

**Please Note** 

Open for Inspection times and property availability is subject to change without notice. We highly recommend registering for an inspection you are going to attend to avoid disappointment for cancellations. If you are registered for an inspection, you will be notified by SMS if the inspection is cancelled. 

 **Caution** 

Marshall White has exclusive leasing rights to this property. We do not advertise on Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace or any other social media platforms. Please beware of scammers and apply only via the official advertising link using the Snug platform.

heading: Classic Charm in Coveted Pocket
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Enjoying the tranquility of a quiet streetscape with the vibrancy of High Street's boutiques and restaurants on the doorstep, this charming double fronted period residence's 3-bedroom plus study floorplan and deep private north-facing garden delivers irresistible lifestyle appeal. 
 
Baltic pine floors flow through the central hallway to a sitting room/study and a generous living room, both with open fireplaces. Northern light streams through the inviting living/dining room and the gourmet kitchen which is appointed with stone benches and a Miele oven. The living space connects with the deep private north-facing garden through fully opening bi-fold doors and the large decked area is ideal for al fresco dining.  
 
Downstairs there is a double bedroom with built in robes a stylish bathroom with separate toilet and a separate laundry, while two additional bedrooms are upstairs beneath vaulted ceilings. 
 
Just a short walk to Armadale station, trams, elite schools and Union St Reserve, it includes hydronic heating, RC/air-conditioning, laundry, outside toilet, water tank, roof storage, 2 sheds, off street parking for one car. 
Land size 396sqm approx. A must inspect! 

**To Inspect**

To book an inspection, click either the ‘Request Online Inspection Link’ or ‘Get in Touch’ then select ‘Request an Inspection’ to enter your details. An inspection invitation will then be sent to you via our application platform. If there are no available inspection times, or you cannot attend the listed time, please send an enquiry or contact the leasing agent for further assistance. Please note ‘add to plan’ is not booking into the inspection.

**Please Note** 

Open for Inspection times and property availability is subject to change without notice. We highly recommend registering for an inspection you are going to attend to avoid disappointment for cancellations. If you are registered for an inspection, you will be notified by SMS if the inspection is cancelled. 

**Caution** 

Marshall White has exclusive leasing rights to this property. We do not advertise on Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace or any other social media platforms. Please beware of scammers and apply only via the official advertising link using the Snug platform.

heading: Sublime South Yarra Sophistication
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Commanding a privileged position within easy walking distance of both Chapel St and Toorak Rd, this impressively-sized, single bedroom, boutique apartment is a brilliant opportunity for you savour all the cosmopolitan benefits of a South Yarra lifestyle. Contemporary class is infused with some older-style charm in this secure, boutique, first floor / top floor apartment that gazes out upon the coveted, leafy and sun-dappled bliss of Cromwell Rd. 

Organised around an open fire place (not operational), the lounge room is an ambiently welcoming space, semi-attached to kitchen / meals and with the joy of its own balcony, whilst the bathroom is pristine and fully-tiled in white. Accessed securely by intercom, the home also features mirrored robes in the bedroom, gorgeous timber flooring, picture rails and a rear garden that offers a remarkable sense of sanctuary for such a central location. Split System for heating and cooling in the lounge. 
 
Access everything, on foot, from this blue chip position: the refined cafes and boutique shopping of Hawksburn Village, the more vibrant street culture, dining, bars and nightlife of both Chapel St and Toorak Rd, plus you have trams within easy reach and Hawksburn Railway Station is comfortably walkable as well.

heading: Timeless and Tranquil, Moments from High Street
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions

Nestled in one of Melbourne's most coveted neighbourhoods, this spacious and beautifully presented one-bedroom elevated apartment offers a unique blend of tranquillity and urban convenience. Located directly opposite the scenic Armadale Reserve, this top-floor mid-century gem is peacefully tucked away from a tree-lined boulevard, just a short stroll from Armadale High Street. Surprisingly tranquil, yet close to urban vitality, this top-floor oasis with easy city access offers an unrivalled owner occupier lifestyle or investment opportunity. 

This apartment is bathed in natural light thanks to its prized north-west corner position. The kitchen seamlessly connects to a spacious lounge and dining area with split system unit, leading to a sunny balcony overlooking a beautiful, landscaped communal courtyard. The bedroom boasts generously sized built-in robes, and the bathroom/laundry is spacious and well-appointed. Undercover parking adds wonderful convenience. 

Imagine Armadale Reserve as your own private front garden, mere steps from High Street's vibrant cafes, dining and shopping scene. Commuting is a breeze with Armadale Railway Station and trams on High Street and Wattletree Road providing easy access to the city. Additionally, Malvern Central Shopping Centre is just a stone's throw away.  

**To Inspect**

To book an inspection, click either the ‘Request Online Inspection Link’ or ‘Get in Touch’ then select ‘Request an Inspection’ to enter your details. An inspection invitation will then be sent to you via our application platform. If there are no available inspection times, or you cannot attend the listed time, please send an enquiry or contact the leasing agent for further assistance. Please note ‘add to plan’ is not booking into the inspection.

**Please Note** 

Open for Inspection times and property availability is subject to change without notice. We highly recommend registering for an inspection you are going to attend to avoid disappointment for cancellations. If you are registered for an inspection, you will be notified by SMS if the inspection is cancelled. 
 
 **Caution** 
 
Marshall White has exclusive leasing rights to this property. We do not advertise on Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace or any other social media platforms. Please beware of scammers and apply only via the official advertising link using the Snug platform.

heading: Timeless Elegance Meets Contemporary Family Living
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Rich in period charm yet beautifully reimagined for modern family life, this exceptional solid-brick residence combines gracious proportions, designer finishes and a deep west-facing garden in one of Malvern East’s most prized pockets.

Beyond the exceptionally wide central hallway and soaring ceilings, refined formal living unfolds with an elegant sitting room featuring a gas log fire, complemented by a generous dining room with an open fireplace, perfect for hosting memorable family gatherings. Dark-stained Blackbutt floors lead through to a sun-filled open-plan family domain where everyday living truly shines.

At the heart of the home, the gourmet chef’s kitchen is superbly appointed with Bosch appliances including oven, combi-microwave, warming drawer and integrated coffee machine, stone benchtops and a large walk-in pantry. Expansive bi-fold doors seamlessly connect the living spaces to the private, leafy rear garden—an ideal setting for children to play and for relaxed outdoor entertaining.

The luxurious main bedroom offers a serene parents’ retreat with designer ensuite and walk-in/built-in robes, while three further double bedrooms are thoughtfully serviced by a stylish family bathroom.

Set in a peaceful, family-friendly precinct moments from Gardiners Creek trails, Hedgeley Dene Gardens, Darling and Glen Iris stations, trams, cafes, shops and Melbourne’s finest schools, this outstanding home also includes ducted heating and cooling, split-system air conditioning, laundry, irrigation system, water tank, garden shed, tandem garage and additional off-street parking.

A refined family sanctuary where period beauty and modern comfort come together effortlessly.

title: 4/9 Cromwell Road, South Yarra, 3141
heading: Modern Living at 4/9 Cromwell Road, South Yarra
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Tucked away in one of South Yarra's most desirable locations, this two-bedroom apartment offers a perfect blend of style, comfort, and convenience. Bathed in natural light thanks to its north-facing aspect, the apartment feels warm and inviting from the moment you step inside. 

The spacious bedrooms are complemented by a well-designed bathroom, which also includes laundry facilities, providing both practicality and ease. Whether you're looking to unwind or entertain, the open-plan living area is ideal for both relaxation and socializing. 

One of the standout features of this home is the secure lock-up garage, offering peace of mind and added convenience in such a vibrant neighbourhood. 

this prized locale is well serviced by public transport, including Hawksburn station and both trams & buses on Malvern Road. And when it comes to location, this enviable address has it all. Various parks are within a stroll for your daily exercise or weekend relaxation, popular cafes and restaurants are close by so you can leave the car at home and the city is just minutes away for a quick and easy workday commute. 

Please note – the fridge and washing machine are NOT included with the property. 

**To Inspect**

To book an inspection, click either the ‘Request Online Inspection Link’ or ‘Get in Touch’ then select ‘Request an Inspection’ to enter your details. An inspection invitation will then be sent to you via our application platform. If there are no available inspection times, or you cannot attend the listed time, please send an enquiry or contact the leasing agent for further assistance. Please note ‘add to plan’ is not booking into the inspection.

**Please Note** 

Open for Inspection times and property availability is subject to change without notice. We highly recommend registering for an inspection you are going to attend to avoid disappointment for cancellations. If you are registered for an inspection, you will be notified by SMS if the inspection is cancelled. 

**Caution** 

Marshall White has exclusive leasing rights to this property. We do not advertise on Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace or any other social media platforms. Please beware of scammers and apply only via the official advertising link using the Snug platform.

heading: Spacious, Light-Filled Home in Coveted Kooyong Location
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Well-presented and light-filled throughout, this renovated residence boasts a northerly rear aspect with direct access to Sir Zelman Cowen Park and sporting grounds.  
 
The home offers exceptional flexibility, comprising two main bedroom suites located upstairs and downstairs, both with private ensuites. A further two bedrooms with built-in robes share a balcony, while the well-appointed kitchen features quality Miele appliances and flows seamlessly into an expansive open-plan living and meals area. This space is enhanced by an open fireplace and a striking glass atrium that frames garden views over the entertaining deck and rear garden. A versatile home office or formal sitting room opens onto a private terrace, complemented by a separate laundry, central bathroom, and additional powder room.  
 
Features include original hardwood floors and Art Deco ceiling roses, modern comforts such as hydronic heating and air conditioning throughout, ceiling fans, ample storage, garden shed and two secure off-street car spaces behind a remote gate.  
 
Ideally positioned in a highly sought-after, family-friendly location, the property is within easy reach of Kooyong Train Station, Kooyong Village, Kooyong Tennis Club, and the many prestigious schools for which the area is renowned. 
 
**To Inspect**

To book an inspection, click either the ‘Request Online Inspection Link’ or ‘Get in Touch’ then select ‘Request an Inspection’ to enter your details. An inspection invitation will then be sent to you via our application platform. If there are no available inspection times, or you cannot attend the listed time, please send an enquiry or contact the leasing agent for further assistance. Please note ‘add to plan’ is not booking into the inspection.

**Please Note** 

Open for Inspection times and property availability is subject to change without notice. We highly recommend registering for an inspection you are going to attend to avoid disappointment for cancellations. If you are registered for an inspection, you will be notified by SMS if the inspection is cancelled. 

**Caution** 

Marshall White has exclusive leasing rights to this property. We do not advertise on Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace or any other social media platforms. Please beware of scammers and apply only via the official advertising link using the Snug platform.
