heading: Family home and so much more
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions

This home is positioned in a fabulous pocket of Malvern. At first glance you will notice the landscaped gardens, grand entrance hall with polished floor boards which welcome you via the character filled veranda. Three king size bedrooms all with built in robes and fourth bedroom or formal dining room, offer luxurious accommodation, serviced by large modern bathroom with bath. A functional open plan kitchen with quality appliances including an electric oven and gas cook top, with the original wood stove as an ornamental piece that pays homage to the original home. The kitchen overlooks the open plan living room and is supported by a separate large formal living room. Additional features include split system heating and cooling, ducted heating, a separate laundry, secure large back yard for the children or to entertain in, remote control off street parking for two cars, sprinkler system, gardening included and walking distance to Glenferrie Road shopping, restaurants and schools.

heading: Luxury Apartment Designed with Roof Top Terrace and Citiy Views
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Superbly situated in one of Melbourne’s most desirable shopping precincts is this 2-bedroom luxury apartment that offers you elegance at the highest level right in heart of High Street.

Floor to ceiling double windows frame the natural light and combine with the timber flooring and soft blue tones to provide an atmosphere of style and restraint.

A generous living zone adjoins a well fitted kitchen which includes stone bench tops, dishwasher, gas cooktop and electric oven.  With ample storage, living and entertaining in this one-of-a-kind apartment will be a breeze. A clever design provides 2 separate bedrooms with generous storage and ensuites with exceptional finishes and quality tapware throughout. Additional features include a large sunny balcony, your own rooftop terrace with city views, split system heating and cooling in all zones of this property, euro laundry, private access from behind High Street. Located in the heart of Armadale this is one of the highest quality apartments on the market today.

**To Inspect**

To book an inspection, click either the ‘Request Online Inspection Link’ or ‘Get in Touch’ then select ‘Request an Inspection’ to enter your details. An inspection invitation will then be sent to you via our application platform. If there are no available inspection times, or you cannot attend the listed time, please send an enquiry or contact the leasing agent for further assistance. Please note ‘add to plan’ is not booking into the inspection.

**Please Note** 

Open for Inspection times and property availability is subject to change without notice. We highly recommend registering for an inspection you are going to attend to avoid disappointment for cancellations. If you are registered for an inspection, you will be notified by SMS if the inspection is cancelled.

Marshall White has exclusive leasing rights to this property. We do not advertise on Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace or any other social media platforms. Please beware of scammers and apply only via the official advertising link using the Snug platform.

title: 16A Glyndebourne Avenue, Toorak, 3142
heading: Salter House – A Walter Burley Griffin Icon Reimagined
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Designed around a central courtyard and enveloped by private native gardens, Salter House is an iconic Walter Burley Griffin–designed, single-level three-bedroom family residence, beautifully re-crafted through a comprehensive architect-led restoration. This thoughtful transformation honours the home’s architectural legacy while seamlessly aligning it with the demands of contemporary living.

Rich in character and bathed in natural light, the welcoming floorplan unfolds to reveal two generous living rooms, each featuring an open fireplace and illuminated by signature Chevron windows. The dining room enjoys leafy garden outlooks and a direct connection to the entertaining deck, while the sleek modern kitchen impresses with stone benchtops, quality European appliances and a meals area ideal for everyday family life.

The main bedroom is a peaceful retreat, complete with a walk-through robe and a stylishly updated ensuite. Two additional double bedrooms are serviced by a spacious central family bathroom, while a well-appointed European laundry off the kitchen with abundant storage completes the home’s practical considerations.

Outdoors, the gardens, thoughtfully landscaped by Sam Cox, offer a series of zoned terraces and paved entertaining areas, enhanced by a tranquil water feature and an established palette of native plantings, creating a true sense of sanctuary.

Additional highlights include off-street parking for two cars, hydronic heating, cooling, and polished floorboards throughout. Set well back from the street, the home enjoys a coveted lifestyle location within easy walking distance of trams along Toorak Road and Glenferrie Road, Kooyong Station, and the parklands of Gardiners Creek. Renowned schools including St Catherine’s School, St Kevin’s College and Scotch College are all close by.

**To Inspect**

To book an inspection, click either the ‘Request Online Inspection Link’ or ‘Get in Touch’ then select ‘Request an Inspection’ to enter your details. An inspection invitation will then be sent to you via our application platform. If there are no available inspection times, or you cannot attend the listed time, please send an enquiry or contact the leasing agent for further assistance. heading: Refined Toorak Living with Generous Proportions and Modern Comfort
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Positioned within a quiet and tightly held Toorak pocket, this beautifully presented residence offers a seamless blend of space, natural light and thoughtful updates, creating a home that is both functional and effortlessly elegant.

Upon entry, a generous living domain sits at the front of the home, offering excellent proportions and flexibility. To the rear, an open plan kitchen and dining zone forms the heart of the home, featuring ample storage and a practical layout. Beautiful French doors open out to a sun-drenched courtyard, creating a seamless indoor-outdoor connection and an inviting setting for everyday living and entertaining. A central split system provides heating and cooling for year-round comfort and underfloor heating downstairs.

A striking skylight positioned above the staircase floods the home with natural light, enhancing the sense of space and connection between levels.

Upstairs, the accommodation is well considered and highly functional. The exceptionally generous main bedroom offers an impressive sense of scale, complemented by a walk-in robe and a recently renovated ensuite. Two additional bedrooms are positioned nearby and are serviced by a recently renovated central bathroom, both finished to a high standard with a clean and timeless aesthetic. Hydronic heating throughout the upper level and ceiling fans within the bedrooms ensure comfort across all seasons.

Additional features include a separate home office or study positioned on the ground floor, a powder room conveniently located upon entry, a dedicated laundry and excellent storage throughout.

Superbly located moments from Toorak Village, parklands, leading schools and public transport, this is a home that offers both lifestyle and convenience in one of Melbourne’s most prestigious settings. A must inspect!

title: 5/3 Stonehaven Court, Toorak, Vic
heading: Boutique apartment in excellent location
description_plain:
Solid brick externally with internal flexibility to open the space, this delightful home encompasses a welcoming entry, endearing lounge and dining areas, a sizeable retro kitchen, 3 well proportioned upstairs bedrooms with built-in robes, a fully appointed classic bathroom and a sunny west-facing courtyard with external laundry/powder room.

Updated with Daikin ducted heating/air conditioning, complete with a garage including storage.

Walk to Toorak Village's boutique outlets and classy cafes, the Toorak Road tram, the Orrong Road bus, Brookeville Gardens, Toorak Primary School and Toorak station.

**To Inspect**

Please refer to the listed inspection time/s. If no inspection time is available or you are not able to make the listed time/s please click "Get in Touch" to request an Inspection Time or Contact Agent and register your interest.


**Please Note**

Open for Inspection times and property availability is subject to change without notice. We highly recommend registering for an inspection you are going to attend to avoid disappointment for cancellations. If you are registered for an inspection, you will be notified by SMS if the inspection is cancelled.

heading: Architectural Excellence with Rooftop Sanctuary
description_plain:
Please refer below for inspection instructions.

Positioned within a coveted tree lined setting on the edge of vibrant lifestyle precincts, this brand-new multi-level residence is the result of a refined collaboration between Developers c/o Locale, Builders M+A Group, Architects DKO and landscape architect Florian Wild, delivering a home defined by architectural integrity and thoughtful environmental design.

The exterior reflects this vision through Eco Timber’s Shou Sugi Ban cladding, a traditional Japanese charring technique that produces richly textured blackened timber façades of exceptional durability. Deep window shrouds and black Colorbond detailing anchor the architecture within its leafy streetscape, creating a bold yet refined presence.

The entry level introduces the master bedroom suite, complete with built in robes and a beautifully appointed ensuite bathroom featuring a freestanding bath. A private lift services the home, complementing the staircase and allowing effortless movement between levels.

A versatile secondary living zone opens to a private courtyard garden, creating an inviting indoor outdoor retreat ideal for entertaining, working from home or relaxed day to day living. This level also provides direct internal access to the secure garage, along with a full laundry and practical under stair storage.

Above, two additional bedrooms with built in robes are serviced by a stylish central bathroom, offering excellent separation for family living, guests or a flexible home office setup.

The upper level opens to a light filled living and dining domain framed by expansive glazing and leafy outlooks. Engineered oak floors run throughout while the kitchen showcases deep toned cabinetry balanced with lighter oak and refined stainless steel detailing across the island. Integrated Fisher and Paykel appliances, including a French door refrigerator and induction cooktop, complete the well-appointed kitchen designed for everyday living and entertaining.

Crowning the residence, a spectacular rooftop terrace offers sweeping treetop outlooks and irrigated garden beds, creating a beautiful outdoor sanctuary for entertaining or quiet relaxation. An adjoining third living zone provides flexibility as a rumpus retreat or home office.

Additional features include reverse cycle heating and cooling, double glazing, solar power, generous storage and premium Faucet Strommen tapware. Positioned moments from Central Park, East Malvern Village, Darling Station, Hedgeley Dene Gardens and a selection of Melbourne’s leading schools, this exceptional home delivers architectural sophistication in one of Malvern East’s most desirable settings. A must inspect!
